name: Jade
description_html:
Meet Jade 💚

If you’re looking for a big love bug with an even bigger heart, Jade is your girl.

Jade is an 9 year old pitbull who completely redefines what “senior” means. With a medium energy level more like a 5-7 year old dog, she enjoys a nice walk or a burst of play- but her true specialty? Being the ultimate cuddle companion. She is incredibly sweet, affectionate, and happiest when she’s snuggled up next to her people.

Jade is fully house trained, does well being home alone for extended periods, and is respectful of household rules (she’ll happily get off the furniture when asked—though she’d love an invite back up for snuggles!). She also loves car rides and is always ready to be your co-pilot.

A few of Jade’s favorite things:

🐾 Snacks (her love language!)

🐾 Cozy naps

🐾 Sunbathing

🐾 Walks & car rides

Jade adores kids and brings a fun, playful energy—but due to her size and enthusiasm, she may do best with older children who won’t be easily knocked over during playtime.

Jade would thrive as the only pet in the home, as she prefers to have all the love and attention to herself. She can be reactive to other dogs on walks, so a home with a backyard or space to stretch her legs would set her up for success.

On walks, Jade really shines once she knows and trusts her person. With her owner, she can sit and walk nicely at a heel. With new people, she may test boundaries and can pull (she is strong!), but she improves as that relationship builds.

Like many big, lovable goofballs, Jade can get a little overexcited at times and may try to hump when she’s extra happy but she responds well to redirection and structure. She is also a quiet dog & rarely barks.

The best part? Jade has no adoption fee and no known medical needs—just a heart full of love ready to give.

If you’re looking for a loyal, affectionate companion who will fill your home with warmth (and take up most of your couch—and your sunny spots), Jade might just be your perfect match. 💛

name: Huey
description_html:
Once a nervous pup, Huey has blossomed into a happy, 45-pound bundle of energy who can’t wait to get outside, grab a toy, and stretch his legs. Volunteers adore his goofy zoomies and the way he leans in for butt scratches—his favorite “sweet spot.”


Huey walks nicely on a mostly loose leash and doesn’t pay much attention to other dogs while out and about. He knows some commands and loves to play, especially once he’s comfortable. Though he may be shy with new people at first, he warms up beautifully with patience and gentle introductions.


After a long stay at the shelter, Huey is ready to leave the past behind and find a loving forever home where he can finally relax, play, and just be himself.

name: Trap
description_html:
Affectionately called "Dorito Ears,"


Trap is very smart and knows the common commands. He would also want to let you know that he would love to learn more from you! His favorite things in the world are discovering balls in the yard and his friends.


This cuddle bug would like an medium/active energy owner. By this we mean, you either love walks or would fit him into your gardening time in the yard. He would know how to self entertain with balls/toys as you garden, but sometimes would come in check with you to make sure you know he's still your garden pal.


Treat motivated and Dog selective, Trap can be friends with his peers with proper introductions. He trusts the humans he knows and will slowly warm up to strangers.


Once he gets some of his energy out, Trap is very content just relaxing, check in for some pets, napping, and playing with his toys. He also loves to snuggle. Trap is very house trained and rides well in the car. He is a very smart cookie and loves puzzle games too! He will thrive with an active person who will engage his body and his brain.


Come meet Trap soon! If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey.


If you've read this far, here are some unique quirks Trap has. He is afraid of sizzling noise of kitchen cooking, curious about dish washer, and is not a fan of the vacuum sounds. Will gather most of his toys into a place he's identified as his safe space / nap spot / or eating place. Knows the words home, find it, and inside + up/down. Understands Let's go/ walkie. Has a strong sit and lay down command is still being worked on.

name: Meshe
description_html:
Meshe is a fun loving girl. She has the best smile that'll brighten your day! Meshe has been in foster living with another dog for awhile now and has great home notes. She loves to cuddle with the resident dog and foster mom says Meshe is very chill at home, that she likes to sleep alot.

Meshe loves playing with squeaky toys and chewing on elk antlers, but is definitely not a fan of small animals. So, she'd be best with dog only families and no cats or rabbits. Reach out to the behavior team to set up a meet and greet with your dog(s) today.

Meshe also enjoys outings and car rides. She behaves well in the car, happily lying in the backseat, looking out the window.

Meshe would be a great hiking buddy. She really enjoys a good adventure! Her only hang up is no water sports. She's content to run around with her toys instead.

Meshe is a long stay pup that been fortunate to be living in a foster home these past 2 years, but her wish would be to find a loving, forever home with another dog to play with. Meshe is a cuddler and would love to snuggle next to you in bed. She truly is a joy to be around. Meshe will make you laugh and steal your heart.

name: Teddy Bear
description_html:
He's well rounded, smart, wise, relaxed about life, and listens well. He's perfectly house trained and stays home alone well for long hours with his favorite independent activities, playing and napping with his toys. He loves affections when you are ready to dish them out and he's not demanding or pushy for them, he'll wait until your free. He's healthy too and just an overall easy dog to manage in a home.


Do you like the company of a dog to ride along for quick trips? He absolutely adores that - burgers, coffee runs and more.


Here's a couple things that really sing to his heart;

A home with a fenced yard, or if no yard, peaceful walks

He loves the peace of being an only pet but if you have a resident dog and would like to see how they hit it off, we're happy to schedule a dog meetup at the shelter.


See Teddy's spotlight video


Teddy's the kind of guy who's there for you through thick and thin, and without requiring a lot of fuss and over sight. Why not give him a try? Foster trial to adopt is an option too.


His adoption comes with extra support for a fresh stash of toys and a future vet care credit so he's easy to get established into a new home, all from his advocates at ClassicCaninesATX


He can't wait to meet you! Inquire on his link to speak with his foster about what he can do for you or write caring@classiccanines.org

Don't let this one slip by!

name: Jack
description_html:
Jack's had a challenging life. His people couldn't care for him, which brought him to the shelter about a dozen times over the years. Jack learned how to cope and tolerate life's storms. To say the least, he's resilient. He's great with all people, little and big. Jack is now looking for his forever home as a senior dog. We would like for him to finally have a chance at a regular dog's life. He deserves that.

His friends at ClassicCaninesATX are ready to help him, now we just need the person who wants to make a difference in this happy guys' life. Jack doesn't have to accept life laying down in a shelter - he can have a good life outside of the shelter walls, a time very well spent.

Jack loves people best, big families, little families, people of all ages. He's a champion snuggler and TV watcher and would love a spot simply hanging out in a living room. He's not a fan of cats at all but has some light dog experience and could work well with a calm, easy dog in the home- we can schedule a doggie meet up at the shelter.

Time is on the clock for Jack so don't miss out and don't skip over Jack if you're ready to help change a life forever more to give Jack the stable home life he's never had.

name: Marina
description_html:
Meet Marina

You'll love Marina - she's sweet, sensitive, a cuddler, a player, a great all around companion. She's thrived in a multi-dog home, and in a home with just one other dog.

She's a great size and nice middle age of wisdom - you can take her just about everywhere but she also stays home alone very well.

Marina is being treated for a touch of anemia and will soon be healthy again if you don't mind waiting just a bit, we'll get it sorted out. Her advocates at ClassicCaninesATX are helping her meet her health goals. To learn more contact caring@classiccanines.org

name: Stax
description_html:
This handsome Shepherd-Cattle Dog mix (DNA in photos!) has spent over a year at the shelter, but outside those walls, he’s pure gold. Stax is house-trained, calm, and melts into a snuggly, affectionate companion once he’s in a home. Volunteers call him “an utter delight” and “one of the easiest dogs here.”

He loves stuffies, snacks, and squirrel watching. Stax walks well in quiet spaces (can be vocal if passing dogs). He's an A+ cuddle buddy who loves quiet, cozy homes.

Stax is also eligible for VIP Adoption, which gives prospective adopters a 30-day trial period to welcome him into their home and make sure it’s a great long-term match. It’s the perfect way to get to know this big-hearted boy and see just how easy he is to love.

name: Fritz
description_html:
Fritz is a former community cat who was brought to the shelter because he was sick. He had a URI and he wouldn’t eat. He was also extremely shy and didn’t think humans were all that great. He moved into a foster home and made a complete recovery.

Fritz is a Cactus Cat, and we think his best situation is to live outdoors (or indoor/outdoor). He would be happy to work for his food and shelter, as long as he has a cat buddy to hang with.

Fritz is good friends with Chip, but they don’t need to be adopted together.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Fritz and all Cactus Cats/Desperate Housecats!

name: Remi
description_html:
Meet Remi ~ the lady shepherd ~


How will she fit in your home?

• Her energy level is low-med and easy going

• She self-entertains with her favorite toys-she's goofy and cute as she tosses and catches them, sometimes she carries them off to bed with her

• She's super house trained

• Easy on a leash (unless she sees a critter)

• She stays home alone well and loves having a crate den to retreat to when she wants to

• Asks before she gets on furniture

• Loves to stay close to her people


What does Remi say BOO to?

• Critters of all kinds including cats

• She really does want to be the only animal critter in her home and she tells us age should have some privileges with it so she can enjoy her silver years without any drama


Remi is advocated for by her foster teams and ClassicCaninesATX. Her adoption package in 2025 comes with an eGift Card for a new toy stash and a veterinary care credit of $150 to get her onboarded with her new owner's preferred provider. Start a conversation with her fosters by clicking on her link.

name: Dietrich
description_html:
Hi! My name is Dietrich. That means "ruler of the people" in German. My foster parents gave me that name since I spent my life being so powerless, now it is my time to learn what it's like to have power. I had a very rough first half of life, and am ready to be loved. I was once emaciated but no more, thanks to all of my advocates. My spirits have been lifted, my setbacks healed and I'm realizing the world isn't so scary, I just needed a different view of it. Whenever I may feel a little tentative about things my people can guide me with affections, or with a nice diversion like a good chew. I'm learning not to be afraid of my dog, cat and bunny siblings because they are family. Family is new to me and I like being part of one now.

I'm really grateful for the new life that's opened my eyes and heart to love, compassion and belonging. I found a whole new world I didn't know about before. If you can appreciate my journey from darkness into the light of a new dawn, and want to make me part of your family, please reach out on my link or to caring@classiccanines.org to connect. .

name: Hero
description_html: Meet Hero, a gentle giant with a heart full of love! This big boy is a sweet and affectionate pup who just wants to be loved. While he can be a little timid at first, he is incredibly gentle and eager to please. Once he opens up, he is the ultimate cuddle companion, happily curling up on the couch for some quality snuggle time. He also has a playful side and likes to explore new toys. His curiosity makes every walk an adventure, as he takes in all the sights and smells around him. Despite his initial shyness, Hero is a quick learner and always ready to impress. He has already mastered "sit" and "stay" before meals, showing just how smart and willing he is to learn. He thrives on patience and kindness, and his confidence continues to grow every day. Whether he's out exploring or lounging at home, he is the perfect balance of playful and affectionate. If you're looking for a loyal, loving companion with a gentle soul, Hero is ready to steal your heart!

name: Bruce
description_html:
Looking to add more joy, presence, and sunshine to your life?

Then it’s time to stop and smell the roses… and meet Bruce!

Welcome to the wonderful world of Bruce — a place where belly rubs are currency, fetch is a national sport, and love is always in the air. To enter, you’ll need just a few essentials:

✔️ Hands for belly rubs

✔️ Tennis balls for endless games of fetch

✔️ A pocket full of treats (because Bruce is a firm believer in snack-based diplomacy)

Bruce is a handsome, high-energy guy who’s all about his people and living life to the fullest. Whether it’s hiking trails, exploring new parks, or just being your co-pilot for the everyday moments, Bruce is always up for the ride. He’s dog-selective, so slow intros or a solo-pet home may be best—but when it comes to humans, he’s all in.

If you’re searching for a loyal sidekick, an enthusiastic adventure buddy, and a reason to smile every day, Bruce might just be your perfect match. Come join Bruce World—it’s full of tail wags, playful zoomies, and unconditional love.


Email blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Cranberry
description_html: The heart on her nose is no joke, Cranberry is truly full of love. If you're looking for a companion to greet you like you're in the honeymoon phase for life, this is your girl. If you're looking for a girl who trots right by your side, this is your girl. If you're looking for a calm, peaceful, and aware presence while exploring the outside world together, this is your girl. If you're looking for a partner who can be nervous at times, but calmed but your validating words, pets, and built trust, this is your girl. If you're looking for a pet who gets excited about adventures and just being together, this is your girl. If you're looking for a pup who appreciates human company, company of other nice dogs, chew toys, walks, close snuggles, treats with tricks and great listening skills, this is your girl. If you're looking for a young dog who is beautiful inside and out, this is your girl.

name: Dandelion
description_html:
After nearly a year in the shelter, Dandelion has truly blossomed into a playful, affectionate, and downright joyful companion. At two years old, this cuddlebug and zoomie enthusiast is soaking up every bit of life on the outside—and he’s ready to share it all with his forever family.

Dandy is a social pup who loves chasing balls, splashing in a kiddie pool, going for walks, and tagging along on whatever adventure the day brings. When it’s time to relax, he’s all about the snuggles—curling up beside you and soaking in the love like it’s his favorite treat.

He gets along well with other dogs and thrives with a little mealtime structure—currently enjoying his meals in a quiet spot to help him feel calm and secure. After eating, he heads out for a quick potty break before jumping back into the fun. He’s doing wonderfully with potty training, going up to 8 hours accident-free during the day and even longer overnight. He sleeps soundly on a couch, dog bed, or right next to you if invited.

Dandelion walks beautifully on a harness and shorter leash, exploring the world at your side with curiosity and calm. He’s smart, eager to engage, and channels his energy into all the right things—like enrichment toys, frozen carrots, stuffed Kongs, Chuck-It balls, and durable chews. He redirects easily and is always up for learning.

Because of an old vocal cord injury, Dandy doesn’t bark loudly—but he makes up for it with happy wiggles, soulful eyes, and gentle energy that speaks volumes. He’ll thrive with continued consistency, love, and either leashed adventures or a secure yard to safely enjoy the outdoors.

Dandelion is that rare blend of fun-loving and affectionate, making him the perfect hiking buddy, poolside pal, and loyal snuggle partner. He’s bloomed beautifully—now all he needs is a home where he can keep growing, loved and safe.


If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Lady
description_html: Lady is a playful, sweet, loving Black Mouth Cur mix. She is very housetrained and looooves people! Lady loves to go on walks, run around the play yard, play fetch, and say hi to every human she sees. She is treat motivated, very curious, and eager to learn new tricks and please her human. Lady is a snuggly, cuddly girl, and very affectionate. This playful, loving girl loves to sit in her human's lap and give all the kisses and she'd prefer to be your one and only so she can soak up ALLL the love you have to give. Lady is an all around gem and is ready and waiting for her forever home and people to love on! Come meet Miss Lady girl today, she's waiting for you!

name: Draco
description_html:
Draco is a gorgeous black dog with fur like velvet.

He's still young, at 1 year old, but he already walks well on a leash and is dog compatible! Draco is looking for a family who will spend time with him, building his confidence and teaching him about the world. He's a very sweet boy that so wants to be with his people.

We think Draco would make a great around town pup, that you could take anywhere that's pet friendly. He loves to play in water! Draco may seem like a lot of energy in his kennel, but that's only because he wants to be out and with you. It's stressful living in a loud kennel. He's a sensitive soul that would make a special companion to any household. He crates himself for meals to wait on his food. And Draco knows Sit, Bed, Touch, and can sometimes Stay.

So, if you're looking for a friend till the end, then Draco is your boy!

If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Toby
description_html:
Meet Toby.

Toby spent over 400 days growing up in the shelter. It was loud, busy, and not built for a sensitive, people-centered pup like him. Now, just a few weeks into foster care, he’s starting to show who he really is!

In a home, Toby is affectionate, silly, and deeply tuned in to his people. He’ll curl up next to you, soften his whole body, and stay there. If you’re calm, he settles. If you’re present, he leans in. He doesn’t just want attention, he wants connection.

What’s been especially sweet is watching Toby learn how to settle on his own. He’s been choosing to lie down beside his person and relax into a snoozle, no chew toy needed. It’s not something he knew how to do when he moved from kennel to couch, but it’s clicking more every day.

He’s also a fun, enthusiastic young dog who loves walks, toys, and exploring the world. At home, he’s an easy, respectful housemate - house-trained, quiet, and able to relax while his people are away for the workday. And with a thoughtful introduction, he has the potential to live with other dogs.

Toby’s ideal match is someone calm and grounded who enjoys an affectionate and people-focused dog. Someone who sees the beauty in a dog who feels deeply and is learning how to navigate that.

Toby is the kind of dog who will make you feel forever chosen.

His current foster is moving at the end of the month, so he is looking for a new best friend to co-author his next chapter. Click the button to get started and we’ll introduce you!

name: Schnucki
description_html:
Schnucki is one of the lucky dogs participating in our new program Enduring Service! This program pairs a shelter dog with inmates at the Travis State Jail to complete a 12-week basic training course. Upon graduation, they will receive a course certificate of completion and a goodie bag to go home with their adoptive family.


Schnucki is not currently onsite at the shelter but to learn more about him and how to adopt, select the “Get Started” button to hear from a staff member! 


Schnucki is a playful and endearing puppy with a lively spirit and a heart brimming with affection. With boundless puppy energy, he loves playing with toys, going on walks, and is always eager to make new friends. Whether he's chasing butterflies or reveling in the scent of wildflowers, his curiosity and joy are truly infectious. Think Jack Russell's energy in the cutest package! Affectionate and gentle, Schnucki craves companionship and will always seek out his people for snuggles and attention. He's a social soul with dog experience, happily enjoying playgroups and getting along wonderfully with humans and fellow pups alike. With his soft white fur and an irresistibly boopable brown spot atop his head! If you're looking for a lively, loving companion who will keep you entertained and shower you with affection, Schnucki might just be the perfect fit.

name: Piggle
description_html:
This soulful gray pittie is a hidden gem. In his kennel, he might seem quiet and reserved, but outside he blossoms into a new dog. He loves walks, splashing in water, and showing off his goofy side with toys (his favorite game is fetch with two tennis balls). Volunteers describe him as affectionate, cuddly, and easy to handle.


Piggle does best with structure and may need some guidance around sharing his toys, but with patience, he’ll reward you with love and loyalty.


He’s housetrained, leash-trained, and ready to leave shelter life behind for good!

name: Lola
description_html:
Lola is a funny looking, stinkin’ adorable feline. She’s been through a lot and has always maintained her sweet disposition. She’s recovered from ringworm, had most of her teeth removed, and may have seasonal allergies and recurrent ear infections. The allergies are easily treated with cetirizine as needed, and regular ear cleanings help keep ear infections from recurring.

Lola is very affectionate and LOVES to be petted. She is great with other cats, and can be adopted into a home with or without a cat buddy. 

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Lola and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Finn
description_html: Finn is a 1.5 year old 50 pound pup with a great smile. He is house-trained and crate-trained. He is currently learning to walk on a leash. Finn is extremely wary of strangers and needs time to get to know new people, but if you have the patience to let him get to know you he will give you his whole heart! Finn would do best in a household with another dog he can bond with-doggy friends give him confidence!

name: Sprinkles
description_html:
Meet Sprinkles! 


Sprinkles is a beautiful 2-year-old pup who’s ready to find her forever family. She’s spent time in a home before, so she already knows what life outside the shelter can look like—and she’s hoping her next chapter is the best one yet.


She enjoys the company of other dogs and could do well with a canine sibling. On walks, Sprinkles can cruise along nicely on leash but may pull when she gets excited—especially if there’s something interesting ahead! The good news? She’s very treat-motivated, which makes training both effective and fun.


A naturally shy girl, Sprinkles is searching for a patient, loving adopter who will help her build confidence at her own pace. With gentle guidance, structure, and plenty of encouragement, she has so much potential to shine in a home environment—and with the right match, she’ll blossom into a loyal, devoted companion.

name: Dusty Rhodes
description_html:
If you’re looking for a gentle, affectionate companion who will adore you with his whole heart, Dusty is your guy! This sweet, soft-souled pup lives for cuddles and connection. His favorite place in the world is right beside his person — whether that means following you from room to room, curling up at your feet, or tucking his nose under your arm for a cozy nap.

Dusty has lived through some rough chapters, but you’d never know it by his big heart and tail-wagging optimism. After arriving at the shelter in tough shape and spending time in the ICU, he’s now fully recovered, and soaking up every cuddle he can get from his adoring fans. Dusty has wonderful manners, too. He’s fully house-trained, polite, and gentle when taking treats. He rarely barks, walks well on a leash, and gets along with every human he meets.  

Dusty’s ideal home is one where he can be close to his people and share lots of snuggles and love. He might even enjoy a dog friend with the right match and a slow introduction, although he'd be perfectly happy being the only dog. If you’ve been wishing for a sweet, playful, loyal, heart-melting companion, come meet Dusty. He’s ready to be someone’s perfect cuddle partner — maybe yours! Come meet him and see why everyone’s smitten with this big-hearted guy!

Interested in Dusty Rhodes? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Chip
description_html:
We LOVE the big-cheeked males! Chip was brought to AAS from a cat community, and although he’s been enjoying indoor life, we think he may be happiest living in a safe outdoor (or indoor/outdoor) environment. He needs to be provided with food and shelter, and in return he could be your 24/7 pest control.

Chip is extremely shy with new people and is a member of our Cactus Cats program. His best situation will be a place where he has at least one cat friend to hang out with. He may never be a cat who is completely at ease around humans, but he deserves a chance to live the kind of life he is most comfortable with.

Chip is great buds with Fritz, but they do not need to be adopted together.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Chip and all Cactus Cats/Desperate Housecats!

name: Leon
description_html:
This handsome boy has a smile that lights up the whole shelter. Leon is sweet, kind and has the most gentle heart. He has become a volunteer favorite and is known for his easy-going nature.


He loves to take a nice long walk around campus. He is respectful and curious. Occasionally, he will roll on his back in the grass. This is when you know Leon is feeling confident and happy.


Leon also enjoys his time playing with toys in a play yard. He runs, jumps in the pool, rolls around in the dirt. He is an all-around happy, playful dog.


Leon has done very well on outings. He is a very good passenger in the car. You can feel his happiness as he relaxes. He enjoys exploring backyards with all the sights and sounds.


This handsome boy would make a wonderful addition to any family.

name: Phoenix
description_html:
Phoenix is a sweet, joyful boy with a heart full of love and curiosity. He’s been thriving in the play yard, where he enjoys long walks, sniffing everything around him, and splashing in the pool. Phoenix is a strong, energetic dog who loves keeping an eye on squirrels and birds, patrolling his surroundings with curiosity and excitement. He also absolutely loves playing fetch — a yard or outdoor space would be a huge benefit for him.

While not the cuddliest, Phoenix shows affection in his own way, giving gentle kisses and leaning into those moments when he wants attention. He’s easy to harness, eager to explore, and quickly warms up to people, radiating sweetness despite what seems to have been a difficult past. His face and fur are healing beautifully, and his resilient, happy nature shines through every interaction.

Phoenix is looking for a family who will celebrate his energy, patience, and loving spirit — someone who can give him space to run, sniff, and play while appreciating the gentle soul he is. Always smiling, Phoenix is truly a boy who leaves a lasting impression.

Ready for a rise through the adventure of life.

🌟Phoenix is also a celebrity after being featured on CBS Austin - check out his visit!

name: Sapphire
description_html:
Sapphire is striking with her beautiful eyes, and ears that like to pop and ping both individually and together. She loves to go on adventures and is great on the leash (and non reactive to pedestrians too)! She hops right in the car and stays in the back, though she’s always up for riding shotgun.


Our girl loves to swim! We’ve noticed that many dogs who like the kiddie pools at the shelter tend to shy away from the big pools- but not Sapphire! She runs and jumps right in.


She loves to play but will stop and automatically sit (her way of politely asking for a treat). She’s a sweet, active, water babe who would love a home to call her own.

name: Alfred
description_html: Alfred is a smart, active, and incredibly sweet boy who's eager to learn and loves having a job to do. He's fully housetrained, knows several words (especially "treat" and "food"), and will do just about anything for a piece of cheese. He can be a little shy when meeting new people, but once he warms up, he's loyal, affectionate, and very devoted. Alfred is social with other dogs, does well with cats, and enjoys playing fetch, zooming around the yard, and keeping watch from his favorite window. Athletic and graceful, Alfred runs like a gazelle but is just as happy soaking up ear scratches and butt rubs. With his brains, heart, and personality, he's ready to be a wonderful companion for the right family. 🐾

name: Patty Melt
description_html:
Meet Patty Melt


Patty Melt has the most adorable face and soulful brown eyes.

What can he do for you?

He's an easy home friend - very housetrained, quiet, relaxed and easy going.

He loves cuddle time with his people.

He walks nicely on a leash and if you're into walks, he's a great dog to have along.

Intelligence built in, he's well cued with his sit, shake, down and he takes treats nicely too!


Ready to check him out as your next companion? Click the link to alert his foster.

He's advocated for by his friends at caring@classiccanines.org who offer extra support for adopters. Find out why mature dog adoption is such an easy seamless fit for people of all ages.

name: Munch
description_html: Munch is an energetic young Cattle Dog whose main priority in life is chasing a ball. If it bounces, he's after it! This spirited pup has an endless supply of enthusiasm for play, whether it's a game of fetch or a lively romp in the yard. He's quick on his feet, incredibly smart, and always ready for his next adventure. When he's not zooming around, you can find Munch mastering a new trick or scouting for the next throw. He's a loyal, fun-loving companion ready to bring excitement to any home!

name: Bear
description_html:
Baron is a volunteer favorite. He's been going on lots of adventures lately and we've learned a bit more about this boy.


He loves car rides and knows "want to go for a car ride". He also knows "want to go to the park". He's great on leash and isn't reactive to any pedestrian traffic (strollers, bikes, dogs, etc).


He's house trained and knows basic commands like sit and shake. Baron loves all things food which makes learning new commands a breeze.


He's one of the more confident dogs when out and about (he's not startled by loud sounds or neighborhood construction). He loves all bodies of water though is still getting used to pools.


At first Baron isn't a cuddly dog that wants pets and prefers to keep touch to a minimum. Once a relationship has been established though he isn't shy to ask for some love!


He's previously lived with a cat but can have a rowdy play style with them. Slow introductions and initial separation would be needed.


Baron can live in a home or an apartment. If you like being active, going on adventures, going for car rides, and the water - he is your boy!

name: Zariah
description_html:
If you’re looking for a dog who loves with her whole heart, meet Zariah. She’s an affectionate, cuddle-forward girl who leans right into you, melts for belly rubs, and happily offers her forehead for kisses. When she’s not snuggling, she’s carrying a toy around the yard and making herself laugh — she can play happily on her own and then trot over for more love.


Zariah walks nicely on leash, is treat-motivated, and is house-trained. She enjoys the company of other dogs one-on-one but can get a little overwhelmed in bigger groups, so 1 dog sibling (or being the only pet) may suit her best. Thinking about adding her to your family? If you already have a dog at home, you can set up a meet & greet at the shelter to see if it's a good fit.


Zariah would love a home that offers:

✔ Snuggle time and affection

✔ Either no pets or a compatible dog friend

✔ Toys and enrichment — she lives for them


This joyful, loving, playful girl just wants a person to adore.

Come meet Zariah — she melts for anyone willing to lean in.

name: Oscar
description_html:
Oscar, with his handsome brindle coat, is a sweet boy with a love for adventure! This pup thrives on exploration, whether he's hitting the trails, engaging in puzzle toys, or sniffing out new scents and romping around on walks. Oscar also loves kongs, squeaky toys, and squirrel watching through the window!

Oscar is a playful and loyal dog, ready for his forever home and someone or a family who can help him build his confidence through fun new experiences. He may be a little shy with unfamiliar things, but that quickly melts away with a few delicious treats and a dose of love. He'll soon be cuddling up with you, ready to be your devoted best friend!  


Interested in Oscar? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Bunny
description_html:
Meet Bunny

This sweet lady came to the shelter in urgent need of safety and care. She came from a tough situation and her condition was rough. She's spent the last few months on an amazing journey back to wellness, and to increased mobility. Bunny can now do everything that dogs do - besides being a great guest at home, she's house trained, she enjoys a little yard time and sunshine on her face. Short walks for exercise help her muscle strength. She's also a fish while guided in a swimming pool. She gives and receives so many affections. She's earned a reputation as a lap dog.


Bunny has a condition that makes her wobbly and unsteady on her feet, but she is aided by standard traction helpers like rugs, mats and being on flat surfaces when outdoors. Her Help Em Up harness also makes things a whole lot easier to guide her when needed. Bunny will do best in a single story arrangement as an only animal in her home.


Bunny's care includes occasional skin and eye management, and keeping her muscles in good tone. Her advocates at ClassicCaninesATX have been providing her care at an outside clinic and will help with supplies and some future veterinary care funding for an adopter.


Are you ready to make a difference in the life of a lady that has come this far already to prepare to meet you? Are you the person who will welcome her to unconditional forever love? Put her on your short list - and reach out on her link to talk with her foster provider or contact caring@classiccanines.org with questions about adoption support.


Watch her Pet of the Week highlight here!


See portions of Bunny's journey over the past few months here and here

name: Lennic
description_html:
Lennic is a playful, silly boy who is always ready to have some fun! He loves his walks and is already ready for an adventure! You can usually find Lennic wiggling around on his back in a yard playing with his favorite toy, or his favorite dog bestie!

When he's not playing with his toys and friends he's happy to get in some cuddle time with his human, He's the perfect mix of energy and affection and will bring all the laughs to his forever home!

If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Chicharrón
description_html:
Chicharrón is a sweet, playful pup who’s just as happy trotting along on a leash sniffing the breeze as he is squeaking every toy in the basket. He’s a soft, gentle player with other dogs and loves making new human friends—especially if belly rubs are on the table!

This charming boy recently had a field trip to a foster home and absolutely nailed it. He was completely house-trained (not a single accident!), respectful indoors, and settled in beautifully. His one hilarious misstep? He couldn’t resist hopping on the counter to check out a forgotten bag of cheese—but hey, can you blame him? One quick “off” and he was back to being the perfect guest. No repeats, just good boy energy from then on.

He explored the home calmly, played with every squeaky toy, and then curled up on the couch for a cozy nap. When a familiar friend came to visit, Chicharrón greeted her with happy wiggles and calm excitement—clearly a dog who knows how to balance joy and manners.

He also did great in the car, hopping right in, entertaining himself with toys in the backseat, and taking in the world through the window with quiet curiosity.

Chicharrón is the total package: house-savvy, leash-lovin’, toy-obsessed, and full of affection. If you’re looking for a loyal companion who’s equal parts playful and chill, this very good boy is ready to be your new best friend.

Adopt Chicharrón and bring home a dog who’s already mastered the art of being wonderful.

name: York
description_html:
Hi, I’m York — and here’s what life with me will look like.

We wake up, I stretch, you stretch, and I greet you with my full-body wiggle. I’m already house-trained, polite in the home, and happiest when I get to be part of whatever you’re doing. Morning walk? I’m in. Coffee on the couch? I’ll be your weighted blanket. Work from home day? I’ll snooze nearby and check in with soft, hopeful eyes.

During the day, I love a mix of play and chill. Toss me a toy, give me a puzzle, or let me romp with a dog friend — I’m playful and social. Then I’ll happily curl up and recharge. I’m not destructive, I know how to settle, and I really just want to be included. At night, I’ll burrow under the covers or sprawl across your lap like the best, warmest security system you’ve ever had.

Future me? I’m confident, connected, and deeply bonded to my people. I’m the dog your friends call “the sweetest boy.” The one who leans into you for hugs. The one who makes your house feel like home. If you want a loyal, affectionate, tender little muffin man who lives for love — I’m your guy.

name: Parker
description_html:
Looking for a dog who will keep you laughing and melt your heart? Meet Parker, the goofball extraordinaire who believes life’s too short not to have fun!


Parker will greet you with an enthusiastic play bow like he’s saying, “Hey friend, wanna party?” He’s got jokes, charm, and is absolutely adorable.


This lovable guy is also full of sweet surprises: he appears very house trained, walks beautifully on a leash, and gives the best cuddles in town. (Fair warning: if you dare to stop petting him, he’ll politely remind you that you’re not done yet.)


Parker loves treats, attention, and anyone who appreciates his comedic genius. He’s affectionate, hilarious, and guaranteed to make every day brighter.


If your home could use a daily dose of laughter, love, and tail-wagging joy — Parker’s your guy!


If you have any questions please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Shelley
description_html: If you want your next pup to teach you calculus, coach you for your next marathon, and provide customized emotional support, look no further than Shelley! She has the personality, charm, good looks, and effervescent energy of ten dogs, and she can't wait to show you all her antics and share her cuddles with you. She'll greet you each day with a winning smile and teach you all the fun games she invents with her toys. She is an energetic bundle of joy wrapped in the cutest multicolored freckles you have ever seen! Don't sleep on Shelley; she is a dream of a dog!

name: Coco
description_html: Never heard Coco bark, very sweet and docile, just wants to be loved and hangout!

name: Panda
description_html:
I’m a big, lanky, wiggly boy with a giant heart and a personality to match. My foster dad says I’m a total goof, because I love to flop right over for belly rubs and squirm around when I’m happy (which is often).


I’m fully house trained and very proud of that. I even know how to use the dog door all by myself, and if I ever find it locked, I wait patiently by the door until my dad opens it. I love my daily walks (sometimes even twice a day!), and I usually walk nicely on a loose leash only pulling when I get excited about a squirrel or another dog I want to meet on the trail.


I’ve lived with a senior dog, and we got along great!...but I sometimes forget that not everyone wants to play as much as I do. I’d do best with a dog friend who enjoys some playtime or a human who’s happy to help me keep practicing my manners.


At home, I’m a pretty quiet guy. I don’t bark much, and when my foster dad leaves, I happily go into my crate and relax until he comes back. I also love my toys and can entertain myself for hours tossing them around the yard like a professional goofball.


I’m super smart and already know “sit” and “stay.” I take treats gently, I’m very trainable, and I just need someone willing to keep helping me learn because I really want to be the best dog I can be. Oh, and if you like running or biking? I’m your guy. I love running alongside you and keeping pace like a champ.


If you’re looking for a sweet, goofy, active companion with a big heart, lots of love to give, and tons of potential, I think we could be a perfect match.

name: Koozie
description_html: Sweet Koozie who we call “Roo” because her ears bounce while we walk. She’s an energetic girl who LOVES playing with other dogs. She has a rowdy play style but takes corrections well if necessary. While she does take some time to warm up to humans, she has learned humans can be safe and regularly solicits affection. She sleeps well overnight in her crate as long as she can see you. She’s would thrive with another confident and playful dog. She’s learning leash manners but would make an excellent running buddy for someone.

name: Fritz
description_html:
Fritz is a happy-go-lucky guy who brings good vibes everywhere he goes. Easygoing, well-adjusted, and always smiling, he rolls with whatever the day brings—walks, playtime, meeting new people—he’s just happy to be included.


He is a handsome boy who loves fetch and cuddles! He takes treats gently and is very good at sitting! 


If you’re looking for a dog with a great personality and an even better attitude, Fritz is the kind of companion who makes life feel a little lighter and a lot more fun.

name: Milton
description_html:
Milton is a smart, happy, goofball! This charming brindle and white dog, with his irresistible smile and waggy tail, is joy personified. Milton's signature look often includes his tongue playfully flopped out, a testament to his lighthearted and enthusiastic spirit. He's a lover of all things fun – a squeaky toy chase, a comfy couch for lounging, and especially, quality time with his favorite humans. Milton is currently being fostered in a home with two children, ages 9 and 5, and a very energetic French Bulldog.

Milton thrives on affection and is always ready to show off happy wiggles as he leans in for pets. He has a good mix of energy, always ready for a walk to do his business (he’s very housetrained), and to sniff around, as well as chill cuddle time. He is a good coexister with other dogs, but mostly is focused on humans. He doesn't guard toys, treats, or food. He's very quick to sit when there's treats or food in sight. If you're seeking a loyal, affectionate, and utterly delightful companion to brighten your days, Milton is waiting to steal your heart. Meet him today!

name: Lilly
description_html:
Meet Lilly – Your Gentle, Loyal Shadow 💕

Lilly will be looking for a new foster home beginning in June 2026. We have absolutely loved fostering her, and this sweet girl has a very special place in our hearts. Unfortunately, we’ll be moving and can’t bring her with us — so we’re hoping to find her next safe, loving landing spot.


Lilly is a shy girl at first, but once she feels safe, her loving personality shines. She bonds deeply with her people and absolutely adores cuddles, belly rubs, and being close to you. One of her favorite things is curling up next to you after a nice walk or ride in the car (yes — she loves car rides!).


She gains confidence from other dogs and truly blossoms in a home with canine companions. When she sees dogs she trusts being brave and happy, she quickly follows their lead. Because she spent much of her puppyhood in the shelter, having a confident dog friend helps her feel that the world is safe and fun. She has never shown any aggression toward dogs or people — she may bark occasionally when unsure, but it’s just her way of saying she needs a moment to feel comfortable.


Lilly is mostly housebroken. She prefers going outside to potty but will use puppy pads overnight if needed. She is crate trained and does well when crated, though she may need a little time to adjust in a new environment. For her comfort and safety, she should be crated or contained when left alone, and she does best when not left alone for more than a couple of hours at a time.


Her exercise needs are moderate — a fenced backyard or a couple of daily walks will keep her happy and healthy. She also loves treats and chew toys, which are great ways to bond with her. She loves playing fetch, so long as it isn't with a tennis ball.


Lilly’s ideal foster is patient, kind, and willing to let her open up at her own pace. In return, you’ll get to watch a shy little heart grow into an incredibly loyal and affectionate companion.


We would love to arrange at least one meet-and-greet with Lilly, our dogs, and her new foster before the transition to help her feel as comfortable as possible.


If you’re looking for a gentle, loving dog who just needs a little reassurance to shine, Lilly may be your girl. 💗

name: Walrus
description_html:
Walrus is a big-hearted lovebug with the most sincere, soul-melting eyes you’ll ever meet. This sweet boy lives for the simple joys in life: long, leisurely walks where he can sniff every interesting smell, and plenty of cozy cuddle time where he can soak up all the love and affection you’re willing to give.


Shelter life has been tough on sensitive Walrus, and it’s starting to weigh on his gentle spirit. What he truly needs is a calm, loving forever home where he can finally relax, feel safe, and be someone’s cherished best friend. The good news? Walrus is already fully house trained and ready to settle right into home life like a pro.


Walrus is dog-selective, meaning he may be able to get along or peacefully coexist with certain dogs with proper introductions. With the right match and a little patience, he can thrive.


If you’re looking for a loyal companion who will walk by your side and curl up in your arms at the end of the day, Walrus just might be your perfect match. He’s ready to give his whole heart; he just needs someone to give him a chance.

name: Walter
description_html: Meet Walter! Looking for the ultimate cuddle buddy? Walter is your guy! This sweet, gentle boy is the biggest lap dog you'll ever meet-he'll happily trade playtime for snuggles any day. Walter is a dream on the leash, making walks calm and easy, and he absolutely adores spending time with his volunteer friends. With his loving nature and gentle heart, Walter is ready to bring joy and comfort to a forever home. He's the kind of dog who will always be by your side, whether you're out for a stroll or curled up on the couch. Whoever gets to love Walter is going to be one very lucky person!

name: Emmitt
description_html:
Our boy Emmitt has loved going on adventures outside of the shelter, and it’s helping us learn more about this very good boy. Inside a home we found him to be so loving. He enjoys having a variety of toys to play with, but doing so right next to his people. He’s a multitasker who likes to play and snuggle at the same time. His signature move on a couch is to put his butt in the air and his head in your lap. This sweetheart is a bouncy ball of fun. At the shelter he loves going for walks, playing fetch in the play yards, or snuggling in the real life rooms.


Emmitt is also very house trained and knows a few tricks. He’s always up for a snack which make adding new tricks to his resume a breeze.


We’d love to see Emmitt in a home with daily walks, a bit of fetch, a full belly, and some extra snuggles.

name: Rocky
description_html:
Meet Rocky


He's an adorable budding prince. You'll find him waiting by his kennel, with a smile and a tilted head because he really wants to connect with you. He hopes you might stop at his kennel, and stay more than a couple seconds to meet him. He's very smart, a craft in the making, and he looks for guidance from his person. His VIP will help him finesse his leash skills, after all he's just a youngster still learning. He has the foundation of becoming a heart dog for his person for a lifetime.


Rocky is neutered, heartworm negative, and ready to roll on out the door today!

name: Whitley
description_html:
Whitley is a sweet and adorable girl who is full of love and energy! She's friendly with everyone she meets and adores being close to her humans, cuddling up whenever she can.

She loves playing fetch, chasing toys, and showing off her incredible zoomies. A yard or an active adopter would be a dream for her. She also has the potential to share her forever home with a dog sibling.

Whitley was being cared for by our medical team for the beginning of her stay with us, so we think this petite lady was just overlooked! But now she's happy, healthy, and ready to start her life and leave her kennel behind.

If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Tonka
description_html:
Tonka is a pure bundle of joy who truly loves everything life has to offer: toys, walks, treats, water, and especially his beloved people friends! He could even join a family with a well-matched canine companion after a meet & greet with shelter staff.

One thing that sets Tonka apart is that he is deaf, which a volunteer noted is a huge asset! During his overnight stay, he "did so so good," adapting quickly to a new home and enjoying outings to sports bars and a friend's house. Being deaf helped him stay calm and stress-free in normally loud environments.

Deaf dogs are trained using hand signals and visual cues with positive reinforcement, and they live just like hearing dogs! For safety, they should always be leashed outside a securely fenced yard. Adopting a deaf dog like Tonka is incredibly rewarding, and there are many resources available to help you.

Tonka is well-behaved, quickly adapts, and is ready to shower his new family with unconditional love!

name: Paxton
description_html:
Meet Paxton

As a fun, mature guy, he knows his true loves, being around his people, quiet time with his stuffies and chews, easy relaxing & leisure napping, having a roll in the grass, taking a sploot in the sunshine and if walks are your thing, he's all in for that!


Paxton's very housetrained (never marking!), stays home alone well, and is respectfully QUIET for the sake of your work at home schedule, and your neighbors. He also shares a relaxed pace with a calm dog friend, a 15 yr old Aussie.


Does this handsome man seem to set your heart a flutter? Connect on his link to chat with his foster or write his advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Snorkel
description_html:
Hi! I'm Snorkel, a bundle of joy who loves to explore every nook and cranny.


Besides being the most handsome boy, I'm playful and friendly, always ready for a game of fetch or a brisk walk. Curiosity drives me, and I'm pretty smart too, quickly figuring out puzzles and games. Independent yet loving, I thrive on a mix of adventure and quiet time. If you're looking for a loyal companion who's always up for a new challenge, I'm your guy!


Let's explore the world together. Adopt me and let the adventures begin!


Snorkel is neutered and ready to leave today!

name: Hank
description_html:
Introducing Hank and his heart of gold! 


When I first met this sweet boy he was very shutdown and scared in the shelter environment. He would cower in the back of his kennel and it took a lot of encouragement from his friends to even go for a walk. 

Since bringing him home to foster, Hank has beautifully opened up and shown the goofy, loving boy that he’s had inside all along. He’ll get so excited when you get home from work and then cuddle up next to you on the couch. All he wants is your love :)


Hank is a pup that will require patience, a gentle touch and an equally tender heart. He’s still learning to be brave in the world and it will take time, especially in a new home, but trust me seeing him blossom is a real gift. And the love he gives his people is fierce and unconditional!


Hank facts:

  • House-trained
  • Can free roam 
  • Quiet boy, very rare to hear him bark
  • Low to medium energy 
  • Expert snuggler!
  • Dog friendly - in fact he would love a calm yet confident dog friend to show him the ropes 
  • Loves a bully stick & cheese
  • Would love a back yard to play fetch (just a bonus!)
  • 100% angel 


Hank is a very special dog and he can’t wait to find his forever home! Is that you?

name: Barry
description_html:
Barry is a lively, curious adventurer who’s always ready to go! Easy to harness, but once that leash is clipped, he’s off with enthusiasm—sometimes pulling, sometimes zig-zagging, and often crossing in front like he’s leading you on his own special tour.


In our real-life room, Barry showed us just how inquisitive he is: grabbing enrichment puzzles off the shelf, spelunking under couch covers, and even helping himself to a few milk bones. He’s a bundle of energy who loves exploring every nook and cranny.


But don’t let his playful antics fool you—Barry has a sweet, affectionate side. Once he’s had his fun, he’s more than happy to settle in next to you for pets and cuddles. He thrives on attention and companionship, making him a wonderful match for someone who enjoys both adventure and downtime.

Barry would love:


An active home where he can run, play, and explore

A family ready to guide his energy with patience and consistency

Plenty of enrichment toys and puzzles to keep his clever mind busy

A comfy spot next to you when it’s time to relax

Barry is ready to bring joy, laughter, and love into his forever home. Could that be with you?

name: Boogie
description_html:
Meet Boogie! 💙

Say hello to Boogie, the cutest little pittie short stack you’ll ever meet! This pint-sized sweetheart is all about love, snuggles, and living life with a happy heart. Boogie may be small, but his personality is huge — he’s got the perfect mix of mellow and playful.

Boogie is a dream on leash and loves going for walks, exploring the world at an easy pace by your side. When you’re busy, he’s perfectly content entertaining himself with a toy or a cozy nap. He’s also shown great manners with other dogs — he’s a polite “coexistor” who enjoys hanging out without any fuss. And bonus points: Boogie has met a cat and passed his test with flying colors! 🐱

If you’re looking for a cuddly, easygoing companion who will fill your days with warmth and your couch with snuggles, Boogie is your guy. Come meet this lovable shorty — he’s ready to wiggle his way into your heart forever! 💞

If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Pop
description_html:
Pop is that dream combo of dog-social, people-friendly, and wonderfully tuned-in to his humans. Out on adventures, he’s polite in the car, easy on leash, and totally down to explore the world with you. And when he lands back home? He turns into the sweetest, cuddliest couch buddy you could ask for.

He’s a sensitive, tender-hearted guy who loves using his brain — offering adorable play bows to show off how smart he is and how happy he feels when you “get” him. In a home, he’s relaxed, gentle, and looks to his person for guidance with those soft, hopeful eyes.

Pop’s Highlights

• Young lab mix with all the lovable lab energy — in a thoughtful package

• Dog-social and polite meeting new friends of all sizes (big and small dogs!)

• Has spent lots of time around a cat in foster

• A+ passenger and outing buddy

•House-visiting champ: calm, cuddly, respectful

• Cute sleeper… yes, he naps like an angel

If you’re looking for a loyal companion who will melt your heart daily, Pop is your guy. Reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart Pop’s heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Bourdain
description_html:
Bourdain has already survived a lot. Found on limping on the side of the road, x-rays revealed bullet fragments in his leg and chest, but you’d never know it from how joyfully he lives each day.

He’s playful, silly, and full of personality. In the play yard, Bourdain turns fetch into an art form — sometimes carrying two toys at once, just because he can (he's a big boy at 76 pounds). Volunteers call him “ridiculously cute” and say he’s happiest leaning in for scratches between rounds of play.

Bourdain can get a little over-excited sometimes, so he’ll need an adult-only home with a patient adopter who can give him some structure. He will need a meet and greet with any resident pups, but his playful, curious side really shines through once he feels secure.

If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com to kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Marshall
description_html:
Marshall is a perfect mix of merry and mellow. He's sharing his adventures with a human friend and a dog friend while he waits for you to discover him!

This ruggedly handsome boy loves a little adventure, car rides, walks, hikes, a little water play. And at home he's a supreme couch potato and a burrito style cuddler. As a mature guy, his indoor manners are excellent of course, he's house trained and crate trained and his level of interaction with his people is very high, he just seems to understand exactly what's expected.

Now that you've discovered him, let's get in touch - start an inquiry so his foster provider can reach out to you.

Marshall is advocated by his friends at ClassicCaninesATX - you can also write them with questions at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Doobie Dab
description_html:
Meet Doobie!

Doobie is a sweet, sensitive cuddle bug who just wants to be close to his person. He’s a dream on the leash and loves going for relaxed walks around the neighborhood. He's silly and goofy, and loves toys! Doobie already knows several commands — “sit,” “lay down,” and even “night-night” — and he sleeps soundly through the night on his bed.

This smart boy is crate-trained, house-trained, and friendly with other large dogs. He does best with calm, lower-energy pups (too much excitement can overwhelm him), but he enjoys the company of other gentle dogs. Above all, Doobie is a loyal “Velcro dog” who loves being by your side and will quickly become your shadow and best friend.

name: Sandler
description_html:
If Sandler had a dating profile, we're pretty sure it would look something like this: 

About me: Hi there, I'm Sandler! Hoping to find a handsome, playful and cuddly young man you can introduce to your friends and family? Here I am. Seeking someone who shares your passion for an active lifestyle and highly trainable? Ding ding - you found him. Looking for someone who is incredibly good looking with a heart of gold? Look no further. My personality is even better than my handsome looks.

Looking for: I'm in it to win it. I want a lifelong companion. Someone who I can plant roots with (don't worry, I won't dig them up), go on adventures with and grow old with. Already started a family and have kids, the human or furry kind? That won't scare me away. I love other dogs, both male and female and love to play. 

Ideal Date: A long walk or play session in the yard with my toys, taking a quick dip in any body of water, a puddle will do, and then getting loved on by my human. Who of course gives me snacks. To wrap up the date, we'd go back inside and Netflix and Nuzzle. I'll even let you pick the show as long as I can snuggle up, get some scratches and take a cozy snooze.

Think this could be it, the true love you've been looking for? Swipe right, aka come meet me at the shelter today!

name: *Dennis
description_html:
Meet Dennis 🧡

Dennis is a sweet, easygoing guy who really shines once he gets a moment to settle in. He may need a few minutes to warm up when coming out of his kennel, but after that, his gentle and affectionate personality takes over.

In our living room set up at the shelter, Dennis has been a total pro—very housetrained, non-destructive, and happy to relax with a toy while soaking up attention and pets. He’s the kind of dog who’s just as content hanging out with you as he is entertaining himself nearby.

On leash, Dennis generally walks nicely and doesn’t need a harness. He settles into a comfortable, mostly loose-leash walk.

He’s also a smart and eager learner! Dennis is treat-motivated, knows “sit,” and will sometimes offer a paw—an extra cute bonus.

With a little patience at the beginning, Dennis shows you just how loving and laid-back he really is. He’s ready to be someone’s loyal, chill companion.

name: Angel
description_html: Meet Angel - your future adventure buddy with a heart of gold! Angel is a smart, loyal girl who picks up new things quickly and keeps us smiling with her charming personality. She's housetrained, crate trained, and does well being left alone for a few hours. Like many young dogs, she still has some puppy behaviors-like mouthiness-that she's working on. She's also making great progress with leash reactivity through training and already showing improvement. Angel would thrive in a home with a fenced yard where she can run and play. While she could do well in a family setting, she tends to bond closely with one person and would be an amazing, loyal companion for someone looking for a smart, active partner.

name: Mariah
description_html:
Mariah is one of the lucky dogs participating in our new program Enduring Service! This program pairs a shelter dog with inmates at the Travis State Jail to complete a 12-week basic training course. Upon graduation, they will receive a course certificate of completion and a goodie bag to go home with their adoptive family.


Mariah is not currently onsite at the shelter but to learn more about her and how to adopt, select the “Get Started” button to hear from a staff member! 


Mariah is a sweet, intelligent pup with a big heart and an even bigger love for people. She's friendly with everyone she meets and, after a little time to adjust, does well with most other dogs too. Mariah isn't shy about saying hello, she'll happily walk right up for pets and attention! She already knows several commands, including sit, down, stay, paw (both hands!), and touch, and she even has a cute "bang bang" trick. Like many smart dogs, she's especially motivated when treats are involved. She's potty trained and mostly kennel trained, making her a great fit for a home ready to continue reinforcing her good habits. Mariah truly shines when she's outside. She loves having space to run and play, and she does especially well off-leash in a secure area. A home with a big yard would be ideal for her active, playful nature. She tends to stay close and doesn't wander off, making her a wonderful companion for outdoor time. During playtime, Mariah can get a little excited with her toys, so gentle guidance or a quick distraction can help keep things calm and fun for everyone. With her loving personality and joyful spirit, Mariah is sure to bring happiness and companionship to any home lucky enough to have her.

name: Alfie
description_html:
After seven months in a kennel, Alfie has had some time in a foster home and is finally discovering what it means to be someone's beloved dog—and he's absolutely flourishing. This handsome, 1.5 year old brindle boy wakes up every morning with pure joy, tail wagging wildly just at the sound of his name. He's still learning how his body works and how big he really is, but his enthusiasm for life and love is undeniable.

Alfie's ideal day includes trail walks at Walnut Creek or Southeast Metropolitan Park, where he'll take his time orienting with a good sniff before settling into a comfortable pace—some jogging included if you're up for it! He's unfazed by the chaos of the world around him (cyclists, construction, strollers—bring it on) and would happily greet every person and pup he encounters. Back home, he's your kitchen companion who loves watching you cook without counter surfing or being a nuisance, your work-from-home buddy who won't interrupt your conference calls, and your most enthusiastic car ride passenger who respectfully enjoys the view from the back seat. Whether you're hitting a food truck where he'll charm the baristas or running errands, Alfie is thrilled to be along for the ride.

He's got the basics down—sit, stay, wait, come, lay down—and his food motivation makes training a breeze. He's housetrained, crate-trained, and non-destructive when left alone. Yes, he's still mastering polite greetings (his excitement sometimes means jumping and enthusiastic kisses), but with high-value treats and consistency, he's making progress. Once the initial excitement fades, he's content to chew his toy while you visit with friends. He's dog-social from his shelter playgroup days and could live with another well-matched pup. With medium-high energy that's easily satisfied by two daily walks and enrichment toys, he balances adventure with serious nap skills.

Alfie is loyal, loving, and ready to give his whole heart to a single adult, couple, or family with kids 12 and up. This playful, affectionate, smart boy has already proven he fits seamlessly into a loving home, and now he's ready for his forever.


Email Alfie's shelter volunteer advocates at blueplusbusters@gmail.com to meet him and start the process to foster or adopt!

name: Xena
description_html:
Get to know Xena......... a loving brindle babe!

Xena is very smart and quick learner with the help of treats. She knows sit, shake, down, and kisses. Treats and food are big motivators and help to distract her when necessary. She is low to medium energy and rarely barks.

Xena casually strolls on a leash, but does get excited when she sees squirrels and lizards. She doesn't seem bothered by passing people or other dogs at a distance. She understands "Let's go and This Way." Expect to see some zoomies in a backyard. She likes to chase soccer balls. She is also happy to sit outside with her human and people-watch.

Spending time with Xena inside - She is housetrained. She will self-entertain with toys of all kinds, not a picky girl. Give her a smoked beef bone with marrow, and she is the happiest dog. Loves, loves, loves belly rubs!!! She is at ease when being groomed (bath, nails, and ears).

Xena loves car rides and is an excellent passenger. She does not jump over seats in an SUV. She will alternate looking out the window and lying down.

Xena is a great catch! Check her out!

interested in Xena? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Yeti
description_html:
Looking for a calm, cuddly companion? Yeti is your guy! This sweet, gentle, and mellow pup has been at the shelter since July, patiently waiting for his perfect match.


Yeti is very house trained, leash trained, and has the perfect medium energy—always ready for a walk, then a nap and some cuddles. He loves food and treats and enjoys the company of other chill dogs.


Oh, and he’s kind of a star—Yeti made a TV appearance on FOX 7, charming everyone he met!

See the segment here: https://www.fox7austin.com/video/1087057


If you’re looking for a laid-back, loving best friend, Yeti’s your match. Come meet this handsome boy today and see why everyone’s falling for him!

name: Beef
description_html:
Beef is a handsome young pup with cute puppy eyes that show all the love he has to give! Beef loves fun and games; he lives for fetch and a good romp with any ball!


Beef isn't just a playful goofball; he also shows his true gentlemanly side. He's already housetrained and walks like a pro, making him great on a leash. Plus, he's shown to be dog-friendly and done well in playgroups. 


Ready for a devoted, ball-loving companion to bring some joy to your life? Beef is ready for his forever home!


If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com

name: Sweet Pea
description_html:
Meet Sweet Pea

This cuddler and a charmer is home tested and has all the important skills expected of a mature lady, She's loving, attentive, very housetrained, mannered, rides well in the car. At less than 60 lbs she's smaller statured. She's spayed and heart worm negative and ready to go home right away. .


Sweet Pea prefers not to cohabitate with other pets. Sweet Pea has had some past traumas and being in close proximity to other dogs at the shelter has been very unnerving for her. An ideal setting will be with a loving family in a home setting where she can find her zen. She's so ready for that. Are you ready to meet this pretty lady? Sweet Pea is advocated for by the orangedotcrew@gmail.com - reach out with questions or come by to meet her.

name: Camila
description_html:
Camila is a beautiful girl with the sweetest face and a happy little smile that makes her impossible not to love. 

 

This wiggly girl is incredibly affectionate and loves scratches so much she'll do a little dance to ask for more! Camila is whip-smart, very treat motivated, and already showing how trainable she is. She enjoys sniffing adventures and has a playful, sweet side with other dogs. Once she feels comfortable, she’s also a big cuddler who loves being close to her people. 

 

Camila is ready to love someone unconditionally—could that be you?

name: Mae
description_html:
Meet Mae! She's a friendly girl who loves a game of fetch. Mae is very friendly once she gets to know you and will climb in your lap for cuddles and pets. 46 pounds isn't too big to be a lap dog, right? We don't think so! Mae gets along well with her current room mate at the shelter, too. She goes potty like a champ outside. What more can you ask for? Adopt Mae today!

Interested in Mae? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Jacket
description_html:
Jacket came in with Striper when their caregiver could no longer keep them. They both love each other very much so they should be adopted together. Jacket is a friendly, playful and active boy in the home, but may take a little time getting to know new people. He's shy in the shelter so don't believe his scared little face. Behind that initial fear is a curious, affectionate boy who is looking for some stability and lasting love in his life.


Adopt Jacket & Striper, and open your home up to two boys who really need it!

name: Shamu
description_html: Poblano has been through some tough times and he's not the happiest camper at the shelter. He's lived with other cats before but doesn't seem to enjoy their company, so he would do much better on his own. Poblano can be a hidey cat when he's not feeling brave. He may prefer a calmer home with a cat savvy person to set him up for success. He's not a great fit for small children or dogs. This poor guy could use a place to decompress and get his kitty life back on track!

name: Sosa
description_html:
Sweet Sosa is blind but can see some shadows and light but it doesn't stop him from participating in life. Sosa has some hearing loss but he can hear and follow his foster when she calls his name, claps her hands or whistles. He's learned his indoor and outdoor boundaries really well. Each change of living situation will require a short relearning period.


Sosa likes to play with and follow the resident dog who's about the same size and a little younger. Sosa loves squeaky toys and balls, and a roll in the grass, cuddles, belly rubs and walks well on a leash in his neighborhood. After some training, Sosa has mastered use of a doggie door and more impressively, he'll even pick up a toy from the living room, walk through doggie door and drop the toy in the backyard all by himself. When his foster cooks Sosa likes to quietly lay in the kitchen, hoping for a taste.. After a full day, Sosa sleeps soundly through-out the night.


Sosa's health needs have been caught up while in foster care. He's even had a dental. An allergy shot helps him stay comfortable during seasonal changes.


It's onward to the best of the rest of his life to a safe, loving home.

Apply on his link to start a conversation with his foster mom.

name: Jr
description_html:
• Do you have a big heart for a sensitive dog who will make every little win feel huge?


  • JR came to the shelter after his owner had a change in housing, and the shelter has been a hard place for him. He is one of those dogs who feels everything deeply, and while he may not be the dog doing big, flashy things right away, he is exactly the kind of dog who will make your heart swell with every small, brave win. 


JR came in with a few other dogs and is now the only one still waiting. For his first few months, he kept to himself and did not quite want to leave his kennel. But little by little, he has been getting braver every day, taking new steps, trying new paths, and showing the kind of quiet progress that feels incredibly rewarding to witness. He is the kind of dog who reminds you to slow down and enjoy the little things. With JR, flourishing might look like a short walk, a tiny tail wag, or choosing to follow you somewhere new, and somehow those moments feel huge. 


He would love a gentle foster or adopter who can move at his pace and help him keep building confidence. JR is a sweet, soulful guy who is scared of the shelter environment but full of potential outside of it. Give him a chance, and you will get to watch him bloom.

name: Franco
description_html: 🐾 Meet Mr. Franco - Your Gentle Giant in Training! 🐾 Looking for an adolescent pup who's already house, potty, and crate trained? Good with dog-savvy kids? Happy to chill by your side while you work or watch TV? Full of personality and gets along with other dogs? Then Mr. Franco might just be your unicorn! Franco is a big-hearted goofball who doesn't quite realize his own size. He's the perfect mix of cuddly and calm, with bursts of excited energy when it's time to play, especially with people, pups, or when there's food involved. Franco was recently in foster care, where he worked hard on his recall, patience, and manners. Like many tall boys, he's been known to counter-surf, but his foster mom assures us: "We're working on it!" Hand him a toy or a bone, and Franco's in heaven. 🏡 Ideal Home: Franco will thrive in a home that can offer him a balance of activity and downtime-think daily walks or dog park play, followed by some solid couch cuddles. Due to his size and puppy energy, we recommend a home without cats and without very young children, unless they're experienced with dogs.

name: Mr Kitten
description_html:
Built like a tank but with a heart as squishy as a land manatee, this big blockhead is basically a canine Travis Kelce: charming, incredibly good looking, and impossible not to love.

Mr. Kitten has excellent leash manners and is wonderfully patient with newer volunteers—he’ll let beginners practice harnessing without a fuss. He’s calm and collected walking past kennels or other dogs, taking everything in stride with his signature mellow confidence.

Under that handsome gray coat is the sweetest heart you’ll ever meet. Don’t let his size fool you: he’s a gentle giant through and through. On the leash, he’s a loose-leash pro; off the leash, he becomes the world’s cuddliest couch companion with plenty of surface area for snuggles.

Kind, loving, and endlessly mellow, Mr. Kitten is the dog who wins people over instantly. Come meet him—your only regret will be not doing it sooner.


Additional Foster Notes

Wow, he's amazing! In addition to the notes above, he's not vocal (doesn't bark), doesn't beg for food, allows bathing and grooming, he's potty trained, and does well in crowds with screaming kiddos and music. He's a great car passenger and was fantastic with my 6 year old niece.

name: Cornelia
description_html: Cornelia is a little shy with new people but a total goofball once she lets loose. At 1 year old she is still bursting with puppy energy - she loves toys, fetch, and would splash around in some water and run around all day if you'd let her! Looking for a high-energy side-kick to all your adventures? Cornelia is your gal!

name: Nayla
description_html:
Nayla is one special girl who will absolutely steal your heart from the very first hello. She’s friendly, fun, and full of affection, always ready for a splash in the pool or a good game of fetch. But don’t let her playful side fool you—she also knows how to slow down and get super cozy, especially when she’s wrapped up in her favorite blankets, just soaking up all the love from her people.


This sweetheart is house-trained and walks beautifully on a leash, making her an easy companion for both busy days and relaxed evenings. Nayla’s the perfect size for cuddles, adventures, and everything in between.


Her beautiful salt-and-pepper face gives her an undeniable old soul charm, and you can tell she’s patiently waiting to find her forever family—the perfect match who will cherish her just as much as she will them.
