He walks politely on a leash and stays close, though sudden noises and quick movements can startle him. With time, consistency, and a calm home, he’s sure to blossom into the cuddle bug he’s meant to be.

Courage has the most soulful eyes—eyes that quietly ask for kindness, patience, and love. You can see how much he wants to bond, to feel safe, and to finally relax into a family of his own.

If you’re looking for a gentle companion who will reward your patience with deep, loyal love, Courage is waiting for you.

name: Noelia
description_html:
Hi, I’m Noelia 💕


I’m sweet, cuddly, and my biggest dream is to be the perfect best friend to my forever family.


I’m a very affectionate girl currently living with my foster brother, Ollie, and we’ve truly become best friends. I’m dog-social and love having a buddy around!


I may be pretty, but I’ve got so much more to offer. While I’m almost the total package, no one is 100% perfect. I can get a little spooked by strangers on walks and may bark when I’m on a leash. Because of this, my foster mom thinks I would do best in a home with a backyard.


Inside the home, I’m a total sweetheart. I’m gentle, loving, and happiest when I’m close to my people getting all the affection I can.


My foster mom knows there is someone out there who will feel so lucky to have me, and I know I’ll feel just as lucky to have them.


If you’re ready to give me a loving home and spoil me like the princess I am, I’d love to meet you ✨

name: Daisy
description_html:
Thelma was found running in the busy road right outside of the shelter. Thankfully she was caught before anything happened to her, and she is now at Austin Animal Services!


Thelma may give a few barks when you walk by her kennel but once that gate is open she can’t get into your lap fast enough! If you are looking for a cuddle bug then this is your girl!


💛 Sweetheart

💛 Cuddly

💛 Playful

💛 Great on Leash

💛 Treat Motivated

💛 Volunteer Favorite

name: Scout
description_html: Scout is a striking 6yo tuxedo cat who is a true companion at heart. She is a social girl who loves nothing more than being around her people and will often be found curled up right on the bed for a long nap. Scout is an expert at finding the coziest hiding spots for a deep sleep, but she also has a fun, energetic side that comes out during her nightly zoomies. She is incredibly easy to please, showing enthusiasm for every toy she finds and excitement for any treat offered to her. Scout tells us she prefers to be the only pet in the home so that she can be adored for all her unique qualities!

name: Oso
description_html: Oso has the kind of soul that quietly steals your heart and never gives it back. At 4 years old, he is gentle, deeply loving, and just wants to belong to a family of his own. He melts into cuddles, leans into love, and looks at you like you’re his whole world. Oso is wonderful with kids, adores other dogs, and greets everyone he meets with warmth and trust. When the weather turns cold, he happily snuggles up in his little jammies, perfectly content just being close. Oso isn’t just looking for a home—he’s waiting for his people, the ones he can love forever. If you meet him, you’ll understand why he’s impossible to forget. 💙🐾

name: Ivy
description_html:
Meet Ivy: A Sweet, Loving Companion 🌿

Ivy is a gentle, affectionate girl who thrives on companionship. She walks nicely on a loose leash, is impressively responsive to her name when called, and loves napping while cuddled up with you on the couch.

She enjoys walks in nature and taking in all the sights and smells. Ivy is curious about squirrels (she’ll happily pause to watch them in a tree) but with a little encouragement or a treat, she’s easy to redirect and continue on her walk.

Ivy gets along well with other dogs, greeting them politely and enjoying relaxed, friendly interactions. She’s also courteous and calm indoors, making her easy to live with in almost any setting.

Ivy can be a bit sensitive to loud or new noises, but reassurance from her person quickly settles her. She's housetrained, well-behaved indoors, and respects boundaries unless invited onto furniture. Smart and intuitive, it seems that she would learn a routine quickly.

Ivy’s previous family was heartbroken to have to surrender her due to breed restrictions at their new apartment—through no fault of her own. Now she’s looking for a forever home that will appreciate her love, intelligence, and cuddly personality.


Ideal Home: Ivy would thrive in a household with adults, teens, and/or another compatible dog. She’s ready for adventures, walks, treats, and most importantly, endless cuddles.

name: Indy
description_html:
Meet Indy – Your Future Adventure Buddy & Professional Cuddle Companion! 🐾

Indy is a smart, playful girl with a big heart and an even bigger love for her people. She truly believes everyone she meets is her new best friend — and she’s not wrong. 💛


This bright girl is always ready to run and romp with her dog friends! She was in a foster home with a 9-year-old Mini Aussie and a 2-year-old Lab and loved every minute of playtime. Indy is dog social and would absolutely thrive in a home with a doggie friend. She's also a cuddle bug and loves to curl up behind you while you nap and is happiest when she's close to her person. If left alone, she may cry a little — she just really loves company!


Indy is incredibly smart and picks up on new things quickly. She enjoys puzzle toys, Kongs and durable chew toys/bones. She's still working on her house and crate training, she's very treat motivated so we are confident she'll master this with continued practice.


Indy walks nicely on leash but as any curious puppy she can be easily distracted by the exciting world around her. With her quick mind and eagerness to learn, she has great potential to become a wonderful walking partner.


Indy’s Ideal Home:

  • Another young, playful dog
  • Active adults who can provide structure and training
  • Plenty of durable toys and enrichment


If you’re looking for a playful best friend who will keep you laughing, learning, and snuggling, Indy might just be your girl. 🐶💕

name: Connor
description_html:
Connor is one of the lucky dogs participating in our new program Enduring Service! This program pairs a shelter dog with inmates at the Travis State Jail to complete a 12-week basic training course. Upon graduation, they will receive a course certificate of completion and a goodie bag to go home with their adoptive family.


Connor is not currently onsite at the shelter but to learn more about him and how to adopt, select the “Get Started” button to hear from a staff member! 


Connor is a smart, fast-learning pup who loves being around people and other dogs. He enjoys playtime with friends but is just as happy entertaining himself with a favorite rope toy. He is both house trained and kennel trained for day and night, though he may need a little encouragement to go into his kennel. Connor is still very much a puppy, but he's a well-behaved one with a great foundation. He would do best in a home that will continue his training and offer patience as he grows and learns. With a little guidance and consistency, Connor is sure to become a wonderful, loving member of the family.

name: River
description_html: River showed up at the home of a nice person who gave her a chance indoors and she blossomed. While she may be shy in a kennel, she is lovable and affectionate in the home. She has a cute little void face and big eyes that blink slowly when we chat with her. She may do well with a cat friend (as most cats who come from outdoors do). River is looking for a calm place to relax and show her true self.

name: Victoria
description_html:
Cuddly, sweet, a good listener, respectful, a good learner - all these things describe Victoria.

She's never over the top, she's just right. She's stunning inside and out.


Like all very young dogs, she's perfectly moldable and tailorable with a little guidance from her very important people. .


Stop by so she can charm you.

name: Yuji
description_html:
Shhh,,real quiet like, my name is Yuji and I'm the shy lady in my kennel, sometimes trying not to be noticed. I always let my dog friend handle the human business because I'm the best dog's friend you could ever ask for. My best friend from home was Amy and she was adopted. It kind of ripped my heart out. Then my best friend was Shadow and he was adopted too. I really want to keep my dog friends, not loose them. So if your dog is lonely and looking for a friend, maybe you can pick me and we'll try it out?

I'm pretty content and easy to please, no fluff needed for me and I walk nicely whether on my own or with a dog friend. Conflict? Not for me.

I hope you'll come take a look and schedule a dog meet for me so I can join a friendship instead of losing them at the shelter. What do you say?

name: Rusty
description_html:
Meet Rusty 💛

Rusty is a joyful, fun-loving pup who's ready to find his forever family! With his sweet nature and boundless energy, he brings happiness everywhere he goes. He loves being part of the action-whether that's playing fetch in the yard, going for neighborhood walks, or simply curling up near his favorite people after a day of fun.

Rusty thrives on attention and companionship. He's happiest when he's included and involved, making him a wonderful match for an active family or someone looking for a loyal best friend by their side.

The best part? Rusty already has a great foundation! He's potty trained, crate trained, and knows his basic commands. He's smart, eager to please, and loves learning new things-so continued training will be both easy and fun.

If you're looking for a loving, playful, and devoted companion who will greet you with a wagging tail and endless affection, Rusty could be the perfect addition to your home. He's ready to give his whole heart to his forever family-could that be you? 🐾💕

name: Vittorio
description_html: Vittorio is a compact model of love and charm that comes equipped with extra peripheral vision. He knows a thing or two about keeping a tidy house, as he keeps his kennel clean and seems house trained. While he may look worried, that's just him waiting to see if his attempts at telepathy are working--he wants to read your mind, share his own ideas with you, and make you happy! He can't wait to show you he's the goodest boy who loves back scratches, playing fetch, and walks with you on the other end of his leash!

name: Jagger
description_html:
Jagger, with his cute ears, is the ultimate best friend looking for his forever home! At 50 pounds of pure charm, this sleek, handsome guy is as well-mannered as he is striking. Jagger is house-trained, great on a leash, and ready to settle into your daily routine with ease.

His favorite thing in the world? A good game of fetch! Jagger is always ready to show off his impressive athleticism and playful spirit. When it’s time to head out for an adventure, he’s a total pro, making him the perfect companion for strolls through your favorite Austin park or neighborhood trails.

With his soulful eyes and sweet personality, Jagger is ready to bring endless joy and companionship to a loving family. Come meet this perfect boy and get ready to fall in love!

name: Blu
description_html:
Blu is a handsome boy with a light brown coat that seems to glow gold in the sunlight and striking light-colored eyes that will stop you in your tracks.

This sweet, friendly boy has a big heart and an even bigger zest for life. He loves toys, treats, and affection from his people. Blu is easy to leash up and ready to go, though he can pull with excitement and may get a little over the top around other dogs, so he’d likely thrive as your one and only sidekick.

With a bit of guidance and consistency, his loving personality truly shines.


Come meet Blu and let this golden boy light up your life!

name: The Duchess Of Purr
description_html:
The Duchess was in foster care and this is what her foster had to say about her!


"She’s the sweetest. She’s extremely in tune with people. She loves nibbling on fingers and toes but will respect boundaries. Loves to party at 3 am. Purrs like a symphony. Will attack the vacuum. 10/10 lovely cat and deserves a loving home."


This girl is pretty scared at the shelter, so we would love to see her back in a home ASAP! Adopt The Duchess of Purr today and give her a stress-free life in a loving home.

name: Cupid
description_html: Prepare to fall in love with Cupid! Don't say we didn't warn you about this lovable guy. He craves affection and will stick close to you on outings. Cupid is an excellent walker on leash, and though the shelter may be overwhelming for him, we think he could really flourish in a quiet space with patient, loving people to get him back on track. Just in time for Valentines, meet the new love of your life today with Cupid!

name: Beefy
description_html:
Meet Beefy! A gentleman with a heart of gold and a personality to match! This lovable goofball is all smiles and wiggles, and he lives for playtime and making new friends.


Beefy is a very calm, gentle guy. He enjoys sitting in the grass and cuddling. Walks loosely on the leash and is very chill.


He would be a very low maintenance pet and just wants to hang out. Very very easygoing guy.

name: Darnell
description_html:
Darnel is as big-hearted as he is big-eared! 

 This playful, silly boy has lots of energy and loves toys, treats, and a good game of fetch. Darnell prefers to be the only dog so he can soak up all the attention, and once he feels comfortable, his affectionate side really shines. He's gentle taking treats, and knows some tricks like "sit." 

 Darnell can be a little shy at first and would do great with a patient person who will let him warm up at his own pace. Give him that chance, and you'll gain a loyal companion. 

 Think Darnell might be your guy? Come meet this big-eared goofball!

name: Helios
description_html:
This sweet boy is the perfect mix of playful and affectionate! He has medium energy and would thrive in an active home where he can enjoy walks, playtime, and plenty of love.

He walks nicely on leash with a harness and enjoys getting out for strolls, spending time in the play yard, or exploring during outings. One of his favorite things in the world is a tennis ball—he loves a good game of fetch and will happily bring the ball back, either dropping it at your feet or gently letting you take it from him.

When playtime is over, he’s all about the cuddles. He’s a total snuggler who loves belly rubs and being close to his people. He’s also very gentle, enjoys treats, and already knows the sit command—making training fun and rewarding.

He appears to be housetrained, is leash trained, and seems calm when passing other dogs or people on walks. With his playful spirit, loving personality, and fondness for treats, he’s ready to bring lots of joy to his future family!

name: Oliver Sebastian
description_html:
Oliver Sebastian is an affectionate and cuddly guy who can get anxious when he's feeling uncertain about things. The shelter is a tough place for an anxious kitty, so we would love to see this boy in a home ASAP. He tends to bond strongly with his person and prefers to be the only baby in the family. This senior guy would love a break from kennel life, either through adoption or foster.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Oliver Sebastian and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Mr. Wendell
description_html:
Meet Mr. Wendell! This handsome guy has a grin that could light up a room and a mouth so big, it seems it was made for holding ALL the tennis balls in the world!

Mr. Wendell is a splash-loving, fetch-obsessed goofball who can turn even a dull day into a comedy show with his playful antics.

He’s a well-trained gentleman, knows his commands, and is motivated by treats, but don’t be fooled, this big boy has a heart as soft as his cuddly belly, ready to melt into your lap after a fun-filled swim or a zooming game of fetch.

If you’re ready for laughter and endless tennis ball chaos, Mr. Wendell is waiting to become your new four-legged best friend!

name: Bentley
description_html:
We’ll never understand how someone could leave Bentley outside during the winter freeze without food, water, or shelter. What we do know is that he’s safe now and showing everyone just what an incredible dog he is.


While Bentley is protected here, what he truly needs is a loving forever family who will show him the unconditional love he deserves.


Bentley is fun, curious, and incredibly affectionate. He has a way of making people laugh with his playful personality, and he’s just as happy to be by your side offering comfort when you need it most. He’s the kind of dog who quickly becomes your best friend.


And let’s not forget, Bentley is basically a dog model! With his good looks and charming personality, he’s sure to turn heads wherever he goes.


Bentley is ready to start his new life filled with love, warmth, and security. Could you be his chance at the forever home he’s been waiting for?

name: Jinx
description_html:
Meet Jinx! 🐾

Jinx is an absolute angel with a playful spirit and so much love to give. She’s very housetrained and happiest when she’s out in the play yard, soaking up fun and fresh air.

She even knows the cutest trick—“sit pretty”—and it’s guaranteed to make you smile every time. Sweet, lively, and full of personality, Jinx is ready for a home that will adore her just as much as she’ll adore them.

name: Oliver
description_html:
Oliver was found alone in South Austin and all contacts to his people went cold. He's been fortunate to stay with his finders who say: "He is such a sweet guy and has been easy going since the day we brought him in. He's very laid back but still enjoys getting out on walks. He gets along great with our dogs and the neighbor dogs and has been great with cats. He hasn't been around children as of yet."


"He knows a few commands and is easily treat motivated. I have taken him on a few car rides to adventures around town and he is super chill in the car and lays down in the back seat."


"Oliver loves taking long walks but when he's at home he's very content to lay in his bed and nap."


"I can see him fitting into almost anyone's home."


Oliver is advocated for by his friends at ClassicCaninesATX and that means he's eligible for additional adoption benefits. Ask at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Mustang
description_html:
Chevy & Mustang were born and raised at an auto body shop. Unfortunately, the property became unsafe for them and that's when they came into our care. These are not house cats looking for couches or cuddles. They are outdoor cats looking for a job and they are ready to work for you!

Working cats still rely on people for food, water, and appropriate shelter — they just prefer not to be pet or handled. In return, they provide natural pest control and thrive in an environment that matches their comfort level.

We’re hoping to find a safe, appropriate working cat placement where they can settle in and thrive. They will be spayed/neutered, fully vaccinated, and ear-tipped prior to placement. Our Community Cats team will help with humane relocation!

Interested in 24/7 private pest control? Email communitycats@austintexas.gov.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Mustang and ALL Cactus Cats/Desperate Housecats!

name: Cicero
description_html:
Cicero is the kind of dog who steals hearts without even trying. With his gentle spirit and soulful eyes, it’s truly impossible not to fall in love with him the moment you meet him.


This sweet boy loves going on walks and has beautiful leash manners. Cicero is also a big fan of ear scratches—give him a few and you’ll see his whole face light up with pure happiness.


Cicero is super house trained, sits for treats, and his calm demeanor has made him a volunteer's favorite.


If you’re looking for a loyal, loving companion who will bring warmth and peaceful energy into your home, Cicero might just be your perfect match. 🐾💛

name: Cupcake
description_html: As a free-spirited, cheerful soul who enjoys her independence. She rides well in the car and loves adventure walks. She develops deep bonds with her person, following them dutifully around the house. She loves having her own stash of squeaky toys. She's described as hilarious, sweet and smart. Cupcake knows sit, stay and down and is housetrained. When she's done being a Jr Explorer, she appreciates naps in a spot all her own, where ever she won't be bothered by others encroaching in on her spot or she will protest! She may choose to be by her person. She does best as a solo dog in a calm adult home, but also did well in a limited time setting with an aloof, independent dog friend that didn't compete for affections and sleep spots. Cupcake is charming indeed, yet doesn't like being hastily jostled around by dogs and children, or having to compete with others for access to her very important people. Our sweet tenderoni wants you all to herself. Looking for a personal companion?

name: Sputnik
description_html:
Sputnik is a young male pup with all the fun, bouncy energy you’d expect from a puppy discovering the world for the first time. Everything is new to him, and while he can be a little unsure at first, you can see his bravery shining through as he takes it all in. He wants to experience life, one curious sniff at a time.


He’s already showing how smart and eager to learn he is. Sputnik needs a bit of leash training, but he picks things up quickly and tries his best to understand what you’re asking. With a patient, loving human by his side, he’ll blossom into a confident adventure buddy.


This little guy has a playful streak too — give him a squeaky toy and he lights right up. And when he’s ready to relax, he’ll flop into a perfect puppy sploot, legs stretched behind him like he’s melting into the floor.


Sputnik is looking for someone who can help him grow, cheer him on, and show him that the world is a safe and exciting place. If you’re ready for a sweet, spirited pup who’s eager to learn and even more eager to love, Sputnik might just be your perfect match.

name: Kya
description_html:
Kya is a sweet, playful companion who loves walks and loves to be interactive with people - she's part diva and part funny ham.

She's still learning the ropes of being in a busy, very public kennel building- it can be downright scary for new arriving dogs, so if she steps outside for a moment when you're near, don't take offense-ask for help to meet her instead and you'll get to meet the real Kya, plus maybe you've save her the expense of having to endure more time in a shelter.

She does her best to keep a neat, tidy kennel while walks come just once or twice daily. She's spayed, vaccinated, and heart worm negative and ready to leave right away.

Her advocates at ClassicCaninesATX have adoption support specials too-ask staff about them or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Barkus
description_html:
Barkus was found wandering the streets and eager to greet each dog he crossed. We don’t know his story, but he came in rough shape but a happy and gentle heart.


He gets along great with his foster sister(pit mix) and brother (chihuahua mix). He enjoys running and playing with his foster sister (though he can be a bit rough when very excited). He seems to like to please, sitting right away for treats and giving his paw for more pets. He knows sit, paw, “bang bang!” and lays down in the car before exiting. What a good boy!


He is crate trained, walking into his crate with no hesitation and no fuss. I work from home and he doesn’t mind just laying around (free roam) until my work day is over.


Barkus enjoys chewing on ice, strawberries, sunbathing, chasing lizards, playing fetch, cuddling, toys and car rides. We’re still getting the hang of walking on a leash and he seems to be leash reactive with dogs, but I think he just really wants to say hello.


He will require slow introductions to children as he doesn’t seem to understand them yet. I’m confident that he’ll warm up quickly, once he understands he’s safe.


Barkus seems to just want to be loved and is the sweetest boy around.

name: Chili
description_html: Chili is one of many cats who were found abandoned in a residence. She is shy and unsure of the shelter, which is completely natural given all that he's been through. Chili and all of her feline friends may need some reassurance in a new place and some time to get used to new people. They are all looking for a loving home where they can relax and show their true personalities. They may do well in a space with other cats or can go home together.

name: Chessie
description_html: Chessie is an absolute sweetheart and loves to play. She takes a while to trust new people and relax in a new environment, but she’s worth it! She loves other cats and would make an absolutely amazing companion for the right household.

name: Clove
description_html: Clove is one of many cats who were found abandoned in a residence. He is shy and unsure of the shelter, which is completely natural given all that he's been through. Clove and all of his feline friends may need some reassurance in a new place and some time to get used to new people. They are all looking for a loving home where they can relax and show their true personalities.

name: Nino
description_html:
Nino is a showstopper with one bright blue eye and one warm brown eye—truly one of a kind!

 

Once he’s out and about, Nino is a laid-back, happy boy with a constantly wagging tail. He’s a mostly loose-leash walker who loves sniffing on walks and showing off his good manners—he even knows commands like check in and sit! Nino is house trained and can be very affectionate. He loves to play with toys, especially any rope toy he can find!

 

Nino does best with slow introductions and prefers to be outside of his kennel. With a little patience, this unique-eyed boy quickly becomes a loving partner. 

 

Ready to fall for those unforgettable eyes? Come meet Nino!

name: Butters
description_html:
Butters arrived with an active much smaller sized dog friend who since found a new home. Butters is waiting for his next adventure in life while sharing his kennel space with another large dog. He loves being part of all the activity going on inside and out, and seems perfectly suited for an active lifestyle. He's not ready to slow down any time soon. He'll charm you to the moon and back, along with all your friends too as a great house and walk companion.


Butters and his original doggie accomplice had a mishap with chickens before arriving to the shelter. Expect that Butters may treat small mammals as prey or sport and his home should have a well secured fence.

name: Sassy
description_html:
Sassy is a stunning all-black beauty with a bright white chest and an adorable smile that makes you look back twice.

She is a medium energy girlie, which is perfect for fun, playful moments and then settling down for a relaxing, laid-back rest afterward.

She may be a little shy at first, but with a little patience (and a few treats) Sassy’s sweet side quickly shines through. She’s affectionate, playful, enjoys checking in with her person, and walks nicely on leash. An active home with a yard or space to explore would be perfect for her.

If you’re ready to help a shy girl gain confidence, Sassy might just be your most loyal adventure buddy.

name: Jinxy
description_html:
Jinxy is a super cute young dog who is a joy to spend time with. She enjoys slow walks while sniffing the grounds and strolls along easily on leash. In the playyard, Jinxy loves to explore and run zoomies then jump in the doggie pool, splashing around and entertaining herself.


Sweet Jinxy is housetrained, friendly around other dogs and gentle taking treats. She is a mellow, affectionate pup patiently waiting for her forever home.


Come meet this precious girl. Jinxy can be your best friend!

name: Billie
description_html:
Meet Billy 💛

Billy might be a little shy at first—but give her a second meeting, and you’ll see her true personality shine. Once she knows you, she’s all about friendship, affection, and happy tail wags. This sweet girl absolutely lights up when she sees familiar faces and is always excited to greet her people.

Billy is a dream on leash, walking nicely without pulling and happy to stick by your side. When it’s time to play, her zoomies are guaranteed to make you smile—especially if there’s a tennis ball involved! She’s also shown herself to be respectful indoors, staying non-destructive during her time in volunteer living room setups.

Want to win Billy over quickly? Bring cheese. Seriously—it’s her favorite and the fastest way to her heart.

She can be a little unsure in the car at first, but once she settles in and gets to watch the world go by (with a few treats tossed her way), she relaxes and enjoys the ride.

Billy’s smaller size makes her a great fit for both apartments and houses alike. With just a little patience at the start, you’ll gain a loyal, loving companion who’s ready to be your best friend.

name: Malia
description_html:
Malia is a beautiful, gentle classic tabby lady who just raised her 3 kittens and is looking to be someone else's baby now! Is that you? Would you like to always be

greeted with a soft and friendly 'meow'? 

Being nuzzled into? Lots of adoring eye contact? Malia may be the girl for you!


She has not been around other cats, dogs, or kids in foster, but she has been calm, sweet, and affectionate with humans and will be a great companion!

name: Strudel
description_html: Strudel came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. Despite this, she's affectionate and learning to be braver each day. She may be found in a hiding spot, but she will gladly accept pets and ask for more if you are patient with her. She loves Churu so that may be a great way to make friends. Strudel may enjoy a friendly cat companion in her new home or the company of one of her mates.

name: Milo
description_html:
Milo was once lost but now has found a temporary home at the shelter.

His finder reported he's calm and friendly

Staff reported he's friendly, sweet, gentle, and very calm

In addition he has nice leash manners


He's an easy relaxing boy without a care in the world who simply enjoys the companionship of his people and having a cozy blanket to curl up on. His motto: "Life is good".


Be the change making a difference in his life by bringing him home. He's advocated for by his friends at caring@classiccanines.org - stop by to meet him or email with questions.

name: Milo
description_html:
Meet Milo - the sweetie pie, sleepy, snuggly, travel companion you didn’t know you needed 🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷


Milo is a dream dog: quiet, loving, friendly, cuddly, and the perfect travel companion. He has never met a stranger and is the perfect companion for patio drinks, a road trip, or a hike- Milo loves to go around town and makes friends everywhere he goes (he is great with strangers and kids)


A sweet gentleman, always wearing a smile, mostly non-sighted, possibly due to Uveodermatologic Syndrome (UDS), a condition affecting breeds like his. He's fully content, enjoying life, using all his sensory functions. His visual impairment does not make his care more difficult as he is used to getting around well!


What to expect when meeting Milo?


He'll lean and nuzzle into you, rolling out the welcome wagon..what a nice welcome for your friends and family who are coming over. Look at his perfect teeth, no tartar-impressive! He's heart worm negative, a perfect weight. His coat is beauuuutiful and glorious. Despite his age he can walk for miles and tackle stairs like a champ.


He walks great on a leash and he'll show you how his nose, his side-to-side walk motion, and how airflow keeps him on a steady track. He is doing great in an apartment with regular walks and the neighbors love him. He lived well with a cat and pretty much leaves them alone !

name: Honey Bunny
description_html: Honey Bunny is a sweet girl who loves to play and nap. She is house trained and great around kids. Currently, she is in a house with an 8 year old and no other animals. She is very friendly with our neighbor's rottweiler and does well on walks. She loves to play and will thrive in house with a yard or somewhere she can go on walks, but also does well in her kennel during the day. I have not had any issues with her being aggressive around food, but she eats fast. I will be introducing her to a slow feeder, but I have seen no issues with her digestion etc. I have bathed her and even trimmed her nails with no fuss from her. She would be a great fit in any loving home!

name: Molly
description_html:
Lovely Molly is a sweet, gentle girl who may be a little shy at first but warms up quickly with her friends. She is very housetrained, walks easily on leash and is calm around barking dogs in the kennel run.


Molly also has moments of playfulness and enjoys romping around the playyard and socializing with friendly dogs in the adjacent yard. She is affectionate, mellow and gently takes treats.


Molly will make a wonderful companion in a loving home. Come meet this beautiful lady. She will capture your heart! ❤️

name: Chevy
description_html:
Chevy & Mustang were born and raised at an auto body shop. Unfortunately, the property became unsafe for them and that's when they came into our care. These are not house cats looking for couches or cuddles. They are outdoor cats looking for a job and they are ready to work for you!

Working cats still rely on people for food, water, and appropriate shelter — they just prefer not to be pet or handled. In return, they provide natural pest control and thrive in an environment that matches their comfort level.

We’re hoping to find a safe, appropriate working cat placement where they can settle in and thrive. They will be spayed/neutered, fully vaccinated, and ear-tipped prior to placement. Our Community Cats team will help with humane relocation!

Interested in 24/7 private pest control? Email communitycats@austintexas.gov.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Chevy and ALL Cactus Cats/Desperate Housecats!

name: Bolt
description_html:
Meet Bolt: a happy, silly, and playful boy who’s discovering just how wonderful the world can be.


Bolt loves spending time with his people and finds comfort simply being by your side. He’s always up for a great game of fetch and would make an amazing adventure buddy.


After a day of fun, Bolt is just as happy to settle in and show his affectionate side. He has so much love to give and enjoys being close to the people he trusts. He’s also very house-trained, making him an easy addition to a home.


With his unique personality and joyful spirit, Bolt truly is a special dog. All he needs now is a forever family to share life’s adventures with.


Could that be you?


--

name: Carl
description_html: Carl (previously known as Tweety) is such a sweet boy! He gets along with other dogs great and quickly learned from the senior dog at his foster home. He listens well and loves to play. He loves running around in his foster family’s yard and also loves to chew on bones. Very good in a crate!

name: Kyle
description_html: Kyle (preciously known as Korey) is a sweet and playful boy! He gets along with all dogs and loves to play. He loves to play with stuffed squeaky toys and run around in his foster family’s yard. He is learning cues from the foster family’s dog and is taking well to him. Loves to watch TV. Does really well in a crate too!

name: Bobby
description_html:
Big Boy Bobby - Bobby for short - has never met a ball or person he doesn't like. Bobby is dog-social, sweet, and so very handsome. He'd love to play fetch with his new people, and wouldn't mind a well-matched dog sibling. At the very least, please bring him a home with a lot of balls - his very, very favorite - he will love to prance by you showing off his ball, wiggling his entire body, and then drop his ball and roll on top of it he's just that excited!


Come meet this big-headed, bigger-hearted guy asap - he's waiting for you!

name: Silas
description_html:
Silas is a young pup with a gentle heart and a deep love for people. He truly thrives on human connection—his eyes light up, his body wiggles, and he’ll happily shower you with soft kisses when you give him attention.


Despite his size, Silas is incredibly gentle and well-mannered. He walks nicely on leash after a quick potty break and has great manners. One of his favorite quirks is carrying a toy on walks—he’ll proudly trot along with it in his mouth, stopping now and then to nibble before continuing on.


In the play yard or a real life rooms, Silas prefers to stay close. He’s content splooting on the ground with a chew, checking in often, and leaning in for affection. He’s sweet, attentive, and very people-oriented.


Silas does have some visible scars from his past, but he hasn’t let that dim his spirit. He remains trusting, calm, and full of love—ready to find a home where he can feel safe and cherished.


Silas is the kind of dog who forms a true bond with his person and will be a loyal, loving companion.

name: Velveteen
description_html:
Meet Velveteen ~

Here is the sweetest, gentlest, quietest lady in the room. She has distinctive features like a bunny hop in her trot, and no tail, earning her a sweet rabbit tale name. She loves to quietly watch life unfold, from a window view, or a patio.


She's spayed, vaccinated and heart worm negative. She's house trained and butter smooth on a leash. She's a great compact size, and combined with her good girl manners, she makes an easy fit in many home environments. She shares her space nicely with a large lady senior dog friend.


Velveteen has secured a foster home for most of March. She is available for adoption, or for a foster takeover. To request a meet up for adoption, apply at her link. To request a foster takeover, be sure to complete a foster application at https://www.austintexas.gov/services/foster-pets and then send email to animal.foster@austintexas.gov referencing 21928 - Velveteen


Velveteen has an advocacy group of volunteers - if you have questions, write us at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Dandelion
description_html: Dandelion loves to cuddle! She's very people focused and enjoys having fun with whoever is hanging out with her. She's a playful, friendly girl who was brought in as a stray, but we can tell she had a home at some point. Dandelion is crate trained and mellow once she gets all her wiggles out. This fun girl is ready for a loving home today!

name: Rascal
description_html:
Meet Rascal—your future 60-pound lap dog!


Rascal is ready to leave his past behind and start the next chapter of his life with a loving forever family. This handsome boy is as easy going as they come and has quickly become a volunteer favorite.


Rascal walks beautifully on leash and enjoys relaxed strolls where he can take in the world by your side. He’s a loose-leash walker who makes walks a breeze. While he enjoys getting out and about, what Rascal really loves most is simply being near his people.


With his calm, even-keeled personality and affectionate nature, Rascal is the kind of dog who fits right in and makes every day a little brighter. And did we mention how handsome he is?


Rascal can’t wait to meet his forever family - maybe that’s you!

name: Shrimp
description_html:
Meet the snuggly, spunky, sweet Shrimp! Although he may come off as shy, he warms up quickly to every human he's met (can be easily won over with treats)! This silly puppy is ready to find his forever home! Shrimp is energetic in the home, loves plushie toys he can chew on, and will certainly become your shadow. As much as he absolutely loves to cuddle, he also enjoys getting cozy in his crate. When leaving, he can be coaxed in with treats and settles down immediately!

Shrimp is nearly 100% housebroken, he has had a couple accidents inside, but knows he should go outside to do his business. He enjoys going on walks, but needs an encouraging, patient human who will support him when the outside world feels overstimulating and noisy! When it comes to other pets, Shrimp would prefer to be your one and only! He is still learning that other animals aren't so scary after all.

Are you the one who can help this canine crustacean come out of his shell? Meet the spectacular Shrimp today!!

name: Maxine
description_html:
Maxine = Perfection!


She is a complete dream on leash and a perfect running buddy. Maxine is playful and enjoys chasing balls in the play yard. You want a cuddle bug? Perfect because she wants a lap to sit in and all the love you can give her!


She is a volunteer favorite, and her friends try to get all the other volunteers to meet her because "everyone should get to experience the absolute sweet, gentle, and kind love that will melt your heart from this girl".


Maxine is spayed, heartworm negative, and ready to walk out the door today!

name: Sasha
description_html:
Meet Sasha 💛


Sasha is a 1-year-old, 30-pound medium-sized sweetheart with so much love to give. She may be a little shy at first as she continues adjusting to life outside the shelter, but she’s truly thriving in her foster home and gaining confidence every single day. She’s doing so well outside of the shelter environment, and we would really love to find her a forever home so she doesn’t have to go back. What truly stands out about Sasha is how people-focused she is—she lights up around others and will happily try to win over anyone nearby for pets and attention.


She absolutely loves toys and playtime, and once she’s comfortable, her fun and playful side really shines. When it’s time to relax, Sasha is all about the snuggles—whether it’s on the couch, a chair, or even your bed, she just wants to be close to her people.


She’s currently living with a foster family and gets along well with their dog, showing she can thrive in a home with another pup. Sasha has also spent time around kids and did great, making her a wonderful potential addition to a family.


Sasha is smart and eager to learn—she picks things up quickly and is already crate, potty and house trained. She’s making good progress with her leash walking too.


If you’re looking for a gentle, playful, and loving dog who just wants to be close to her people, Sasha might be your perfect match.


Check out Sasha’s profile for more cute pictures:

https://www.instagram.com/sashathelovebug?igsh=MWs3bzA3ejdzMXhuNg%3D%3D&utm_source=qr

name: Pixie
description_html:
Pixie is a small bundle of sweetness looking for a cozy place to call home. This quiet, gentle girl is already showing how quickly she learns—she’s doing great practicing her leash walking and improving every day.


Pixie has a calm, easygoing personality and absolutely loves being close to her people. She happily allows nail trims and handles gentle care like a champ, showing just how trusting and well-mannered she is.


Her favorite thing in the world? Snuggling. Pixie would be thrilled to curl up beside you—or even better, right in your lap—for some quality cuddle time. If you’re looking for a soft-hearted companion who will happily keep you company and shower you with quiet affection, Pixie might be the perfect match.

name: Sardine
description_html:
Sardine (“Sar-Dean”) is a curious five-month-old boy with an affinity for cuddles and petting, ceaseless play, and food of any kind (especially pate!). Despite being found alone at just three months old, he has quickly learned the luxuries of indoor life, showing off his excellent bathroom manners and meticulous grooming regimen! Even better, Sardine would likely, not only tolerate, but *enjoy* the company of children, other cats, and dogs given enough time and reassurance - he is a single kitten that desperately NEEDS a playmate! Other than his squishy body, our favorite thing about Sardine is his loud purr and meow which sounds like an old-timey telephone or french greeting. 


*Medical Status*

-Sardine has completed a 21 day course of antifungal medicine for ringworm. He is currently pending the first of two negative ringworm cultures to be considered clear. His neuter will be scheduled once he is ringworm-free. 

-Sardine has a small umbilical hernia that will be evaluated and possibly repaired during his neuter. It doesn’t seem to bother him at all! 

-When found, Sardine had a partially degloved lower jaw and the small teeth on his lower jaw were not present. His adult teeth have grown in, but these teeth have not appeared. It is possible that these teeth may never grow in, but he is able to eat wet and dry food and bite during play with no issues. 


Please reach out to hear more about Sardine!

name: Loki
description_html:
Meet Loki 💚

Loki is a happy, social boy who’s been making lots of friends lately—and winning hearts wherever he goes! He’s shown himself to be comfortable with new people, with no signs of shyness or sensitivity to touch. He’s just an easygoing, friendly pup who enjoys being around others.

Loki really lights up when he’s out of his kennel. Whether he’s heading out for a walk (where he does great on leash) or enjoying playtime in the yard with his favorite toys, he’s all about having fun and soaking up the moment.

In our short times in a mock living room, Loki has been a wonderful guest—non-destructive, curious, and eager to explore his surroundings. He especially loved lounging on the couch and trying to take in the view from the window, showing off his relaxed and cozy side.

With his combination of playful energy and laid-back charm, Loki is ready to fit right into a home where he can keep making friends, enjoying toys, and sharing plenty of happy moments.

name: Miss Pretty
description_html:
Don't be surprised if standing in front of her kennel causes her to run and hide. If you wait just a moment, and speak nicely, or offer a treat, you'll soon be on her friend's list. Ask staff to get her out, or if offsite, write her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org for a meet up. Need a meet up with a dog? It can be scheduled while you're onsite.


Miss Pretty has so much to offer:

--She'll never turn down a treat

--She loves comforts and is non-destructive

--She's very house trained , she's also crate trained

--She walks nicely on a leash, not bothered by other dogs

--Her favorite activities: window watching & sniff walks

--Also a pro at riding in the car

A perfect companion.

name: Sage
description_html:
Are you looking for a playful and sweet girl? Sage might be the dog for you!

Sage loves spending time with volunteer friends in the play yard, where her fun personality really shines. She’s a supreme toy tester and a bit of a ham for the camera — always ready to show off her silly side. Sage still has a wonderfully young spirit and plenty of playful energy. After she gets her initial zoomies out, she’s happy to settle into a nice walk and enjoy the world around her. 

You might hear Sage chatting in her kennel, but she’s just trying to tell you hello — and maybe ask if you’ll take her home. Sage is friendly with people and has lived with other dogs before, too. We can host a doggie meetup with yours and see how the dogs hit it off.

This comeback princess has left her past behind and is ready for a life filled with love, comfort, and new adventures. Ask staff for help to meet her or if offsite reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org.

name: Maisie
description_html:
Are you looking for a world-class cuddler who will absolutely melt your heart? Then Maisie might just be your perfect match.


Maisie is ready to start the happy chapter she truly deserves with a loving forever family by her side. Despite everything she’s been through, her heart is full of love and trust. She’s incredibly affectionate, and expert couch snuggler and happiest when she’s giving gentle hugs or snuggling up close to her favorite people.


Maisie also has a playful side and loves spending time with her beloved stuffies or stealing socks when no one is looking. She’s the perfect size, wonderfully gentle, and has such a kind, sweet spirit that everyone who meets her falls for her instantly. She also gets along well with other dogs, and has been doing great with crate training.


Maisie has already stolen the hearts of many volunteers, and we’re pretty sure she’ll steal yours too. All she needs now is a safe, loving home where she can continue to blossom and share all the love she has to give.

name: Gypsy
description_html:
Gypsy is a polite little lady with lovely manners and a steady, easygoing nature. She’s wonderfully house trained, knows when it’s potty time, and enjoys following her nose through the grass like a tiny explorer on a mission. After a long day of fun adventure, she likes to sit back down, kick her feet up, and relax, making her a great friend to decompress with.

Gypsy can be a bit particular about her doggy friends, but she handles those moments with grace and tolerance.

Looking for a sweet soul with a whole lot of heart? Come meet Gypsy and let her charm her way right into your life!

name: Kano
description_html:
Meet social butterfly Kano with a butterfly marking on his head to prove it!: a perfect couch potato, walking buddy, and part-time tap dancer 💃🐶

Kano is a young senior bulldog ~experienced, distinguished, and past the “eat your shoes” phase. He’s fully house trained, crate trained, dog friendly, cat curious and respectful, and he loves every person he meets, big and little.

His signature move? The morning tippy-tappys—a full performance the second he gets out of bed that will absolutely make your day every day.

Kano is a relaxed walker on leash, a big fan of car rides (windows down, ears flapping, living his best life), and always down for a good walk… followed by a nap, obviously. He’s a social eater, so he prefers a little companionship nearby at mealtimes.

Sweet, affectionate and full of quiet charm he's an easy fit for so many households.

Check out his short video

Kano is staying with a foster, reach out on his link for a meetup or email his advocates with questions at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Tiger
description_html:
Tiger is such a loving boy who walks very well on the leash and takes treats gently. He may want to eventually sit down in your lap and get some cuddles.


SO CUDDLY! Toys? Eh. Treats? Not really. Snuggles? YES.

name: Gatanga
description_html: Gatanga came in with several siblings when their owner could no longer care for them. He is shy at first, but loves head pets and gets comfort from it. He also enjoys cuddling up with his cat friends, so he may enjoy a home with feline frienship!

name: Bunny
description_html: Bunny came in with her litter mates when their owner could no longer afford to keep them. She's a sensitive soul and prefers to hide when things are stressful or loud. Bunny would do best in a low traffic, quiet home and may do well with cat friends. It may take a little time to earn her trust, but once she settles in we think she will make a very loyal and affectionate companion!

name: Camila
description_html:
Camila is a 5-month-old red heeler with the sweetest soul and a heart full of love. She absolutely adores people and is happiest when she’s close to her humans—ideally curled up right in your lap. She will also graciously accept all the belly rubs you’re willing to offer. If you’re looking for a cuddle buddy, Camila is your girl.

She’s already off to a great start with her training—fully potty trained, crate trained, and perfectly content to relax in her crate or sleep soundly through the night. She’s a smart little pup who’s already learning commands like sit, down, and come, and you can tell she’s eager to keep learning.

Camila approaches the world with gentle curiosity. On walks, she likes to take her time, soaking in all the sights and sounds around her. With a little encouragement (and a few treats!), she’s gaining confidence and improving every day.

If you’re looking for a sweet, snuggly, and easygoing companion, Camila might just be your perfect match!

name: Ginger
description_html:
Ginger recently arrived in our yard from parts unknown. She's a sweet babe, and she loves humans. We have a 7-year-old human, a 2-year-old family dog, and a 15-year-old cat. Ginger is enamored of the human, playful with the family dog, and curious about the cat from a safe distance.


Ginger's a young pup, so she's all potential. She needs exercise and attention to keep up with her appetite and social development. She's very quickly becoming crate trained, and she's excellent on a leash for her young age (no pulling and no leash aggression so far). Despite being chummy with the family dog, she's shown some food aggression and territorial behavior when family members show affection to the family dog. In our case, the family dog concedes without much of a tussle, but keep in mind that Ginger doesn't yet feel secure about having resources. She needs time and consistent, positive reinforcement.


If you're looking for a loyal, energetic, intelligent friend who brings joyful energy to your world, Ginger might just be the dog for you!

name: Hachi
description_html:
Meet Hachi 💖

Hachi is a sweet girl with a fun, energetic spark! At first, she may show off her playful, “wild child” side—especially when heading out on a leash—but she quickly settles into a nice rhythm and becomes an easy, mostly loose-leash walking companion.

In the play yard, Hachi enjoys doing her own thing but still likes being near her people. She’s the perfect mix of independent and affectionate. One of her absolute favorite things? A kiddie pool! Splash time brings out her joyful, carefree personality.

And when she’s ready to slow down, Hachi has a softer side that’s impossible to resist. Lately, she’s been hopping right into laps for snuggles, soaking up all the love she can get.

Hachi is a wonderful blend of playful energy and growing affection, and she’s ready to bring both fun and cuddles into her future home.

name: Daisy
description_html:
Daisy is a super sweet. She does well with other dogs and loves to spend her day relaxing while every once in a while playing with the occasional toy. She was found with her (presumed) sister, Rosie, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a little anxious on a leash at first, but once she trusts you she will follow you anywhere. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Rosie
description_html:
Rosie is a very sweet girl. She’s great with other dogs, calm mannered and a couch potato! She was found with her (presumed) sister, Daisy, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a bit anxious on a leash at first but once she trusts you it’s easy for her to just walk next to you. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Billie
description_html: Billie is a gorgeous lady with lots to say! As a typical calico, she loves to tell you all about it - her opinions, her feelings, when she's happy, when she's displeased. This sweet, lovely gal's owner passed away recently and so, sadly, she is at Austin Animal Services, waiting to find a new home and someone who will love her and give her all the attention and pets she deserves! We don't know much about Billie's previous life except that she is healthy and doesn't seem to love other kitties. She would prefer adults only or older kiddos and only calm, gentle, cat-friendly dog friends - otherwise she will not be afraid to tell you what she thinks! If you've a space in your heart and home for a beautiful, adult gal, please come meet Billie!

name: Jiminy Cricket
description_html: Jiminy is a very level-headed dog. He is calm and confident, and walks loosely on a leash. He enjoys pets and cuddles and may try to sit in your lap. He’s not excited by other dogs and does great with other people.

name: Beaux
description_html:
Meet Beaux,


He's a Pit/Lab mix (and neutered), with the temperament of a lab and the energy of a pit. He's the perfect family dog, as he's so calm, gentle, potty trained, and loves to cuddle. He is the most calm dog you will ever meet (we've never heard him bark); and for only being 1-year to 1-1/2 years old, he's got so much life ahead of him. He loves going on walks (will always stay with you) and sniffing everything. He's very chill around other dogs as well. He can be very independent and doesn't need to be cared for all day long. He's the perfect addition to any family and we have no doubt that you will fall in love with him immediately. He's got such a kind soul and a soft presence.

name: Onyx Bartholomew
description_html: Onyx Bartholomew has a lot of personality! He's very playful, cuddly and talkative. Onyx seems to do best as the only cat around, which makes shelter life hard since he's surrounded by his enemies! He may get anxiety with new people and places, so needs a slow start to building a new life with a special person. Some of his favorite things are soft blankets, sharing your socks, and nibbling his calming treats.

name: Nigel
description_html:
Nigel is a very sweet and large boy! He is quick to warm up to new people and enjoys spending his time bird watching, playing with wand toys, or following you from room to room. He’s a very chatty and curious guy - he just wants to know what’s going on! He is a little fearful of loud noises and quick movements, so he would do best in a quiet home. If you’re looking for laid back, cuddly kitty, then this is your guy!


I also have a 10 year old dachshund and they have gotten along great, I think he would do well with any low energy/chill companion!

name: Kitty
description_html:
Kitty is the kind of dog who turns heads the moment you meet her. Her tall, perky ears stand straight up like little exclamation points, always ready to catch the sound of a friendly voice or the rustle of something interesting. She has a gentle, sweet demeanor that makes you feel instantly at ease, and you can tell there’s so much personality just waiting to blossom once she finds her person.

She carries a large scar along her back, a quiet reminder that her start in life wasn’t easy. Kitty can’t tell us what she’s been through, but what’s remarkable is how she refuses to let her past dim her view of people. She greets the world with hope, softness, and a willingness to trust again.

On walks, Kitty begins with enthusiasm, then settles into a slower pace where she can take in the world—sniffing the breeze, watching the scenery, and enjoying the simple pleasure of being outside with someone she likes. Her favorite spot on campus is the Real Life Room, where she melts into snuggles and shows us exactly what she’s dreaming of: a home of her own.

Kitty is a world-class cuddler. She loves chin scratches, gives the sweetest hugs, and has mastered the art of climbing onto a chair just to be closer to you for more affection. She’s tender, observant, and endlessly loving.

Kitty is ready for someone who sees her not for the scar on her back, but for the bright, beautiful future she’s eager to share. If you’re looking for a loyal companion with a gentle soul and a heart full of love, Kitty is waiting to meet you.

name: Hooza Goodboy (Louie)
description_html:
Apply to meet this sweet guy! No pressure to commit to adoption after the meet and greet!


Hooza is unlike any dog you've ever met. This big, handsome guy may look tough on the outside, but inside he's pure softness — a calm, kind, snuggly companion who wants nothing more than to be near you.


Hooza's ideal day? Lounging on the couch, soaking up cuddles, and watching the world go by. He's the ultimate couch companion — quiet, content, and completely at peace just being in your presence. In fact, the only sound his foster mom has ever heard from him is a soft little snore while he naps beside you. Check the pet cam and you'll find him doing exactly what he does best: relaxing on the couch or curled up in his bed.


When it comes to walks, Hooza takes life at his own pace. He's building his confidence outdoors and likes to stop, observe, and take in his surroundings before moving on. With a little gentle encouragement, he's happy to keep going — but his true joy is finding a nice spot to sit and people-watch. He could sit beside you for hours just watching dogs and people stroll by, perfectly content to let the world come to him.


Despite his size, Hooza is incredibly gentle. He has never once pulled on the leash — instead, he walks right by your side like a perfect gentleman. And when you offer him a treat? He takes it so softly, so carefully, that it sometimes slips right out of his mouth when you pull your hand away. That's just who Hooza is — gentle to his core.


Hooza is fully housetrained, leash trained, and does wonderfully in an apartment. He has no trouble staying home while you're at work, and when you walk through the door, you'll be greeted by the sound of his tail whacking against the couch — his way of saying he's happy to see you. But his first request isn't a walk — it's a cuddle. He's not a picky eater and takes medication without any fuss. He's started to show interest in meeting other dogs, though he hasn't had much opportunity to meet many while in his foster home.


At night, Hooza loves curling up in bed with you, though he's just as content to snooze on a dog bed nearby.


Hooza would thrive in a calm, low-key home with someone who appreciates his quiet, gentle nature.

name: Lila
description_html: Lila is a bouncy lady who loves snuggles. She enjoys treats and will sit calmly by your side after she has gotten her wiggles out. Lila loves playing fetch and would do well having a yard for exercise or a plan for walks on leash. She's an excellent walking companion, too! Lila is housetrained and knows to "sit" for treats. This smart girl is just beginning her journey and is looking for a loving adopter to join her!

name: Dasha
description_html:
Dasha is a sweet, shy girl. She walks very well on the leash.


And she's potty trained. One of her volunteer friends has been practicing taking Dasha on the agility equipment to give her some good exercise. She's a very nice dog!

name: Dannie
description_html:
Meet Dannie ~ The newest member of the social mixer


Arriving in a shelter at 12 is no laughing matter but this sweet lady came on the scene with a nice energy and a sunny disposition at all times. She truly loves the many friends she makes in people, kids and dog friends and maybe even cat friends (we'll let you know!).

She's staying in a foster family home where she's proven great house manners. She goes for walks daily and wants to be in the middle of all the family activities. She'll eventually flop down for a recharge nap and then be ready for the next round of family fun. She sleeps through the night soundly to prepare for each day ahead.

While she's in her foster home she's getting her wellness needs taken care of through sponsorship by ClassicCaninesATX so her health will be tip top for the rest of her years to come, for picnics, park trips, tenting it with the kids in the yard, and anything else she can hone in on.

Are you looking for a sweet lady that fits in everywhere? Reach out on her link to start a conversation with her foster or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

See my short video here

name: Minette
description_html: Cute little Minette had to be surrendered due to allergies. She's a very well rounded girl who has lived with cats, dogs and kids, though she may prefer a home without the dog friends. Minette loves to hang out where her people are and get lots of pets. If she thinks she's being ignored, she may gently touch your arm to remind you that your hands were made for petting her! This girl is also playful and will do zoomies and keep herself occupied with her favorite toys. Minette will add a sparkle to a lucky home!

name: Nachito
description_html:
Nachito is looking for a fresh start in life that will provide him the privileges of an indoors, loved member of the family. He and his dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather and it's time for a silver lining, a "happily ever after". Nachito is very sweet and a charmer and such a ham - when you're not looking he'll steal the treats from your pocket. He and his mom Sam Dog would love to stay together if you can manage room for both. He appreciates comfort, good meals, people and pets to kick things up a notch-his crew seems to have experience with small dogs and cats. Nachito has also successfully stayed in a crate.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated by him and he promises he'll stop the treat theft just as soon as he's on two square meals a day.

Check out their short video

name: Sam Dog
description_html:
Sam Dog is a lady looking for a fresh start in life to enjoy the privilege of being an indoors, loved member of the family. She and her dog family of two spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather. It's time for a silver lining, a "happily ever after" and she would love to stay with her son Nachito if you can find room for both of them. She's sweet and gentle, yet playful and isn't shy about telling you what she wants. She appreciates comfort, good meals, people and Nachito's fun. She and her crew have experience with cats and small dogs too. She's also stayed in a crate successfully.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated by her and she/ll never forget who gave her that opportunity.

Check out their short video

name: Felicia
description_html:
Felicia has been in need of a fresh start in life to provide her the comforts and privileges of an indoors dog. She and her dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather. It's time for a safe "happily ever after". While waiting for her silver lining, Felicia was welcomed to a foster home where she's getting reacquainted with an indoors lifestyle. She's gentle, sweet and easy, rides well in a car and walks nicely on a leash. She’s learning how to play but prefers to follow her people around and snuggle any chance she gets. She's very polite to cats both indoors and outdoors, and is sharing a home with a very cute small older dog friend. She would probably enjoy a friendly, polite dog she can snuggle and play with. She's shown herself to be a well rounded lady.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated. She will repay you in doggie kisses and loyalty to be your companion and family pet.

name: Cupcake
description_html:
Cupcake is a modern, independent lady! She knows what she wants and has no problem sharing her feelings, which we appreciate. Her main requirement is that she be your only cat, the queen of the castle.

Cupcake loves to play with toys and hang out wherever her favorite people are. Her favorite game is "hunting" toys, so be sure to stock up on plenty of toy mice for this adventurous girl. Cupcake isn't fond of kennel life, so we'd love to see her in a real home ASAP, either through adoption or foster!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Cupcake and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Kit
description_html:
Kit was brought to the shelter after his owner passed away. This can be a tough transition for a pet, and Kit is no exception. He's having a hard time with kennel life, and the best thing for this big, gentle boy would be a quiet home for him to relax in and get used to his next chapter in life. He enjoys pets and appreciates encouragement to help him feel like a brave boy.


His foster let us know: "Kit (I’ve been calling him Big Kitty) has done amazing with me in foster care and has been eating and drinking well.


He’s a docile gentle giant that loves attention and affection. While he is a quiet guy, he has a ferocious purr and a strong head butt. He loves to snuggle and would be a great lap cat. He enjoys laying with his wand toys, but always defers to resting in my lap for snuggles."

name: Evelyn
description_html:
Meet Evelyn 🐾

Evelyn is pure entertainment on four legs! This goofy girl brings nonstop joy wherever she goes, with a playful style that’s guaranteed to keep you laughing. She’s got the cutest zoomies—complete with full-body wiggles and a tucked-under booty—that make her play yard time an absolute show.

Evelyn seems to have a fun, bouncy play style (very reminiscent of a boxer!), and she absolutely thrives when she gets the chance to run and be her silly self. She’s the kind of dog who turns an ordinary day into something way more fun.

Even with all that energy, Evelyn has some great basics. She’s done well on leash and is happy to head out for adventures, making her a fun and easy companion to take outside. She also knows how to sit for treats—always a bonus!

While she’s still getting to know people and building connections, she’s been perfectly comfortable with handling for things like leashing if you go slow and give her treats as a reward. With a little time and continued positive interactions, she’s likely to keep opening up.

If you’re looking for a dog who will make you smile every single day and keep life exciting, Evelyn might just be your girl.

name: Evan
description_html:
Meet Evan 💙

Evan is a gentle, sweet boy who has made wonderful progress building his confidence during his time at the shelter. Watching him come out of his shell has been such a joy—he truly wants to connect and be close to his people.

This handsome pup is a dream on leash, walking calmly by your side without pulling. He’s also very treat-motivated and already knows how to sit, which makes continuing his training both easy and fun.

Evan can still be a little sensitive to touch at first, but he’s trying so hard—leaning in, learning to trust, and showing more comfort every day. It’s clear he wants affection and is figuring out how to enjoy it at his own pace. He’s done great meeting new people, including a recent introduction to a new volunteer, where he showed just how far he’s come.

With a little patience and a lot of love, Evan is going to blossom into an incredibly loyal and affectionate companion. If you’re looking for a kind-hearted dog to grow with, Evan is ready to meet you.

name: Abby
description_html:
Need a hiking buddy with endless wiggles? Meet Abby 🐾


Abby was found dumped in a park, just trying to follow someone home. She’s still the sweetest, most loving girl—just waiting for her person. 💛

She is about 10–11 months old, weighs ~40 lbs, and is spayed! She looks like a Pitbull / Lab / Blue Lacey mix.

Her fans say she’s: goofy, mischievous, playful… and the best snuggler around.


Quick facts:

✔️ House + crate trained (great in the car too)

✔️ Quiet at home—rarely barks

✔️ Good with people, kids, dogs, and cats (neutral + respectful)

✔️ Walks well on leash, food motivated, learning obedience fast

✔️ Loves walks, then couch time with her humans


She can be a little shy at first and still gets spooked sometimes from life on the street—but she bounces back quickly and gains confidence with treats, praise, and patience. She opens up fast and turns into the happiest, wiggliest companion.


She’ll be the one waiting at the door with tail wags and cuddles every single day ❤️

If you want a loyal, loving, slightly goofy best friend—Abby’s your girl.

name: Sushi
description_html: Sushi is a shy girl who has lived with big and little dogs and small children. In her previous home she hid much of the time, though. Since she's on the shyer side, she may prefer a less active home with more peace and calm to help her relax. Sushi can be very affectionate, she just needs to feel safe and secure first. She is available for foster or adoption today!

name: Toast
description_html: Toast is a sweet little boy who loves a good scratching session. He is very food motivated, so training is fairly easy. He loves being outside exploring (in a fenced in yard/park) and chasing bugs. He does well in his crate, is mostly potty trained (he has had a few random accidents inside), and mostly knows simple commands such as sit and down. We are still working with him on doing well on a leash, but he does better every time we take him out. He loves to play fetch (he does come back after throwing a toy, but he may not come directly to you). He loves to cuddle when he's ready for a nap, and does well when it's time to wind down at night. He's a classic sweet little puppy!

name: Beans
description_html: Beans is a sweet little girl who absolutely loves a good scratching session. She is very food motivated, so training is fairly easy. She loves being outside exploring (in a fenced in yard/park) and chasing bugs. She does well in her crate, is potty trained, and mostly knows simple commands such as sit and down. We are still working with her on doing well on a leash, but she does better every time we take her out. She loves to chew, so make sure you have a good variety of toys, as well as give her enough mental stimulation and physical activity. She's a classic sweet little puppy!

name: Buddy
description_html: Buddy and his friends were found abandoned in a crate by a community member. While they are shy in the shelter, we think all they will need is some TLC and a calm home to decompress in to show their true personalities. They may do well in a home with a cat friend for companionship or one of their siblings.

name: Benicio
description_html:
You will be impressed with the manners of this young man. And he's so very attentive to his person,, and impressionable! He wants to seal your approval. He walks in lockstep with his person, so very easy and gentle, well trained on a leash. He's also stayed in a crate before and seems house trained.

Come meet all that you're missing in a trusty, true, gentle companion.

name: Brady
description_html:
Brady is the kind of pup that you fall in love the moment you see him.


He cuddles quietly in his crate, and when it's time for action, he will be happy to go on walks with you or play in the yard.


Brady is loving, cuddly, and a goofball. Very house trained, crate trained, and great on the leash.

He is very treat motivated, so if training is your thing, it will be a breeze.


Come meet him today and fall in love with your next BFF.

name: Uzi
description_html:
Sweet and confident little man "Uzi" arrived to the shelter with a brother just like him who was adopted.

He's now staying in a foster home and here's what his foster says about him: "He loves giving kisses, jumping, and playing fetch. He does well in a room alone for up to 9 hours and is potty trained. He has a great stamina during play time and is confident, leading you on walks without lunging or barking."

Uzi is bold, confident and always excited meeting new small dog friends.

After meeting Uzi, a doggie meet up can be scheduled at the shelter if needed.

Uzi's adoption comes with an extra layer of support from his friends at ClassicCaninesATX - he receives a Chewy gift card for fun toys and supplies, and a veterinary care credit to help for his future wellness needs.

Reach out on his link to inquire to his foster or to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Chloe
description_html:
Chloe arrived to the shelter with a little friend Chiquita. Sadly they parted ways when Chiquita was adopted, leaving Chloe behind due to the medical care she needed. A foster sprang into action and her medical care was paired with support from Classic Canines. Chloe's loneliness was eased right away when she was welcomed home with her fosters, two dog friends and a cat friend.

Chloe then went on to have a double mastectomy and is healing very well and expected to be cleared as a post-op patient by May 1st. Chloe's spirits have been great and her recovery thus far has been very uneventful. We anticipate histopath results the week of 4/20.

Chloe's been through a lot, and it's not over yet. It would be nice if her pot-o-gold was waiting at the end of her medical journey. Chloe's future home will need, first and foremost, companionship, whether a human frequently to be near, or sweet little animal friends for company. A window view to the outside world is on her dream list. She walks well on a leash and is house trained but may require more frequent potty breaks while her body readjusts to it's normal.

If you're looking for a sweet little lady like Chloe, please consider placing an inquiry so the foster can stay in touch with you.

name: Gigi
description_html:
Meet Gigi: The Smartest Little Puppy!

Gigi is a 2-month-old Australian Kelpie mix who is way ahead of the curve. She is at that perfect age where she’s a blank slate. She’s curious, incredibly bright, and ready to learn whatever you want to teach her.


-Gigi knows how to sit and fetch and is currently working on other tricks like “paw”, “spin”, “look”.


-She is semi potty trained- is able to sleep through the night and daily naps in her crate with no accidents.


-She loves people and gets along beautifully with older kids.


-She’s very curious about other dogs and cats.


Gigi’s Ideal Match:

Gigi would thrive with an active family or individual who understands (or is excited to learn about) working breeds. She’ll do best in a home that continues her training and provides her with the mental stimulation she craves. If you’re looking for a partner for weekend adventures and evening snuggles, Gigi is ready to meet you!

name: Gus
description_html:
Meet Gus — a 12/10 good boy who’s ready to bring joy, laughs, and lots of love into his forever home!


Gus is incredibly friendly with both people and other dogs. He’s playful and fun, but also thoughtful—he’s great at adjusting his energy to match his canine buddies, whether they’re ready to romp or just hang out.


He’s still a young guy at heart and gets excited to say hello, so he’s working on keeping all four paws on the ground. Because of that enthusiasm, he may do best with older kids while he continues learning his manners.


Gus loves getting out for a nice long walk (about a mile is his sweet spot), and he’s a dream on leash with his Easy Walk harness. When the day winds down, he’s just as happy curling up next to you on the couch for some quality cuddle time.


He’s a total star at home too—crate trained, no potty accidents, and not destructive. He understands “no,” settles in easily, and even handles mealtime and bedtime in his crate without a fuss. His only quirk? He sometimes likes to start the day a little early—but he makes up for it with enthusiasm and tail wags!


Bonus: Gus loves ice cubes—they’re his favorite treat.


Gus would thrive in a home with another playful dog and an active family who can give him a couple of good walks each day. If you’re looking for a sweet, fun-loving companion who’s equal parts adventure buddy and cuddle bug, Gus might just be your perfect match.

name: Pogo
description_html:
Pogo showed up at our door in early March. He is very sweet and affectionate and friendly. He initially was very nervous around men but now just is cautious until he knows if they are trustworthy. Our older cat was never concerned about him (she has lived with dogs before) and now walks right up to him and rubs up against him.
